programme.title: Kapsul Indahnya Ramadan
programme.desc: Indahnya Ramadan ialah keistimewaan dan kelebihan bulan Ramadan yang membawa suasana penuh ketenangan, keberkatan dan rahmat. Pada bulan ini, umat Islam berpeluang memperbanyakkan ibadah, mendekatkan diri kepada Allah, serta merasai keindahan kebersamaan melalui puasa, solat tarawih dan amalan bersedekah. Ramadan menjadikan hati lebih bersih, sabar dan bersyukur.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Ep82, Ep83, Ep84-Steven attempts to get two of his close friends to like each other.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Ep1, Ep26, Ep42, Ep106, Ep151-Rigby steals a magic keyboard from a preoccupied sorcerer. When Mordecai and Rigby accidentally make a hole in the wall while wrestling a stuffed animal, they use the keyboard to make Pops and Benson give them raises to try to pay for it.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Ep103, Ep191, Ep188, Ep187, Ep106-While tailgating at a State U. homecoming football game, Ben teams up with Grandpa Max's old college buddies to keep the crazy clown Zombozo from robbing the stadium blind at halftime.

programme.title: Courage The Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Ep11B, Ep17B, Ep28A, Ep28B, Ep4B-Vacationing on a cruise ship that sinks, Muriel, Courage and the Farmer end up on a deserted island. The one inhabitant they find is Katz, who runs an unusual 'resort.'

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Ep2, Ep16, Ep77, Ep117, Ep159-While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Ep240, Ep151, Ep162, Ep163, Ep261-Team Tennyson looks to take in the sights of the Shoshone Falls, but when they arrive to find Steam Smythe siphoning off the water, it is up to Ben, Grandpa Max and Gwen to shut down the hydropower plant and save the Falls.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Ep1286, Ep1287, Ep1279, Ep1288, Ep1289-To retrieve the final stem, the Titans must conjure a virtual world full of increasingly harder obstacles in the fourth part of the five-part special.

programme.title: Super Shiro
programme.desc: Ep43, Ep44-From one place to the other, Shiro and Deca chase after each other nonstop! CanCan appears, and they become even more excited!

programme.title: Grizzy And The Lemmings: World Tour
programme.desc: Ep431, Ep428, Ep417, Ep416, Ep425, Ep405, Ep430-The Lemmings decide to free a spirit and send it to Grizzy in revenge for stealing their cartoon moment.

programme.title: The Tom And Jerry Show
programme.desc: Ep158, Ep161, Ep156, Ep163, Ep165, Ep162, Ep166-A little baby goat butts his head through a distant wall of the estate and starts nibbling the grass. At first, he helps Tom with the yardwork but then causes chaos throughout the manor. Tom and Jerry are left to deal with the kid.

programme.title: Lamput
programme.desc: Ep426, Ep427, Ep428-In order to win his approval, the two Docs plan to catch Lamput to surprise Boss' on his birthday, but things get complicated with the other docs in the lab plan to do the same thing. A fierce race starts between the two teams!

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ep115, Ep116-In a dark and cobwebby corner of his attic, Mr. Bean finds a treasure map. The hunt is on! But tricky clues lead Bean up the chimney, round the bend, down the garden path, up the blinking wall and nearly all the way to Australia.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Ep114, Ep139-Nicole needs to make sure Gumball makes something of himself so that when he's older, he flies the nest instead of being a slob at home forever.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!

programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: It's lunchtime on Bluey's deck! But the BBQ needs a salad, so Bingo's relaxing sit-down will have to wait until she finds every colour of capsicum her cousins asked for!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Amazon on a global adventure to discover how scarlet macaw chicks get the vital salt in their diet they need to survive.

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels become enchanted when they hear a piece of music from Duggee's choir. They quickly learn what makes a choir.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels notice that Happy isn't acting like his normal self, and he's strangely wearing new trainers. Happy doesn't know what he's feeling, and his friends want to help him.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: After finding out that Mr Wobbly is visiting next Monday, the Squirrels impatiently want to know how long that means they need to wait.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek threatens to topple the fairy chimneys of Cappadocia in Turkey.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: The Go Jetters spring into action when Glitch's mini-master toys invade Hong Kong Harbour.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Emily worries that she doesn't have a best friend. Soon she realises she's been surrounded by best friends all along.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: Duck is bored of his toy collection, so he and Sarah search for old toys in the attic.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah & Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Fred, Fifi and Ari call Stanley to help them with their recycling drive by coming up with a way of repurposing all the towns' old stuff. Stanley makes a crazy golf course!

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue
programme.desc: Dad is in the kitchen cooking dinner. Rio asks if she can help make dessert, which is trifle. But Rio gets confused, as some of the stew ingredients are mixed in with the trifle ingredients.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: Gran Gran's keys get stuck behind the sofa. Inspired by inventors from the past, JoJo and Gran Gran invent a 'key collector' to get them back!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee's made some delicious pancakes, but the clubhouse is out of honey. Time for the bees to get busy!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits
programme.desc: It's wish-granter Mango, ready to make all the Roots and Fruits cast wishes come true.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits
programme.desc: It's the nicest, kindest, Fig, performing his song, "Just Can't Help Being Sweet!"

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato, and the Veggies, who fall into the Deli Counter and come face-to-face with the Turnip of Terror. They escape with help from the not so scary Turnip.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato's dancing is too powerful and too destructive but when he has to face Evil Pea in a dance off to save his trapped friends he soon realises his dancing can save the day.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po have their favourite things. The bag, the hat, the scooter and the ball all magically swap places and become mixed up.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'moon' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! Before we say good night to the moon, we see a bright moon, a light moon and even a tickly moon!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO
programme.desc: It's the OKIDO circus today, and Messy is worried about performing his triple flip. Will his friends be able to help him conquer his tummy flutters before the audience arrives?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. programme.title: TV Drama
programme.desc: Chinese produced television drama

programme.title: TV Drama
programme.desc: Chinese produced television drama

programme.title: Finger Of Doom
programme.desc: The protagonists are ex-swordmasters who now find joy in making umbrellas. They track down the evil Madame Kung Sun and her poisonous “Finger of Doom”, a unique supernatural power which allows her to transform normal, everyday people into horrifying zombies, and this is just the start of their mythical adventure against this zombie maker!

programme.title: The Human Goddess
programme.desc: This is a love story between an alluring fairy, Seventh Sister, who comes down from heaven to experience life in 70's Hong Kong, and a man who is running a debt laden orphanage. A heartless tycoon plans to take over the orphanage for its land but has to deal with Seventh Sister's magical powers as she aims to protect it from falling into his hands!

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: Young Long Jian Fei, a martial arts novice, is adopted by the Fire Spirit Demon who taught him the powerful Buddha's Palm, turning Long into a martial arts master. Long is tasked by the Fire Spirit Demon to takes revenge for his master, and this soon unleashes a storm upon the martial arts world…

programme.title: The Dream Of The Red Chamber
programme.desc: Adapted from the great Chinese classic novel of the same name, the son of renowned Jia family, Bao Yu, is deeply in love with his cousin, Dai Yu. However, his mother disapproves of their relationship and plots to arrange Bao Yu to marry another rich girl, resulting in a tragic ending for the perfect couple.

programme.title: Have Sword Will Travel
programme.desc: When the head of a manor loses his kung fu skills, he enlists his nephew and fiancée to escort gold to the capital. Along the way, they encounter a mysterious swordsman and join forces with him to stop bandits from stealing the gold.

programme.title: The Duel of the Century
programme.desc: A duel has been arranged at the Forbidden City between two formidable swordsmen of the martial world, Ye Gu Cheng and Xi Men Chui Xue. Lu Xiao Feng smells something fishy about the duel as the two swordsmen never met and do not have any conflicts. He decides to investigate more with Hua Man Lou, and eventually uncovers some hidden conspiracies…

programme.title: Duel Of Fist
programme.desc: Fan Ke discovers at his father's deathbed that he has a half-brother, Wenlie, in Thailand. He goes to find Wenlie, who became a boxer to support his sick mother. Following their encounter, the two got involved in the underworld of boxing match gambling.

programme.title: Danger has Two Faces
programme.desc: Many years ago, Inspector Kam killed an innocent man and decided to resign from the police force. He became a professional killer who disguises as a pet store owner. When his best friend, Bobby begins investigating recent murder cases committed by Kam, he discovers that the mastermind behind these cases is actually his superintendent.

programme.title: Fangs of the Cobra
programme.desc: Incredibly, the title serpent is not a harbinger of horror, but actually the film's hero. This virtuous viper sniffs out bombs, fights gangs, battles a baby-killing rodent and even takes on a duplicitous woman. This one-of-a-kind thriller will be applauded by reptile fans everywhere.

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: In this action comedy, two young men join a rebel group after the Chinese Revolution of 1911 and accidentally become patriotic heroes. Assisted by a warlord's daughter, they successfully help the rebels steal weapons from the warlord.

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: A bandit became a warlord in northern China by helping Russia fight against Japan. Due to his ignorance and silly behaviour, he is seen as a joke to everyone. The warlord is finally killed by the daughter of a troupe master whom he had killed for no reason, bringing a befitting end to a traitor.

programme.title: The Boxer From The Temple
programme.desc: A young monk, The Kid, was expelled from the temple due to his crazy ways. After leaving the temple, he fights a cruel bandit's son and befriends a prostitute. As he fights for justice, his “Crazy Lo Han Fist” improves with every fight.

programme.title: The Butterfly Chalice
programme.desc: In the Ming Dynasty, scholar Tian Yu Chuan defends a fisherman's honour but accidentally kills the governor's son, driving him into exile. Pursued to the river's edge, he is rescued by the fisherman's daughter. Amid danger, love blossoms between them, and Tian seals their bond with his family heirloom, the Butterfly Chalice.

programme.title: The 14 Amazons
programme.desc: The Yang family had served their country in Song Dynasty for generations. When General Yang is ambushed and killed during the war in Jin Shan, the grand matriarch led the entire family to take revenge and defend the country.

programme.title: The 14 Amazons
programme.desc: The Yang family had served their country in Song Dynasty for generations. When General Yang is ambushed and killed during the war in Jin Shan, the grand matriarch led the entire family to take revenge and defend the country.

programme.title: Black Magic 2
programme.desc: Doctor Sing is puzzled by the strange symptoms of his patients and asks his friend for help. The sickness is apparently caused by a black magic that is casted by a wicked man Kong. Kong covets the beauty of Sing's wife and casts an evil love spell on her, while threatening to kill Sing at the same time. Can Sing save his wife and his patients?

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: Huan Zhu's ghost seeks help from “Fake Ghost Catchers” Bao Tuo and Zhou Peng, after a jealous suitor's ghost seeks vengeance by murdering her and now targeting her sister. Together with actor Wu Shun Chao who possesses a supernatural talent, they unite to protect Huan Zhu's sister from both mortal and spectral threats.

programme.title: Woman Of The Night
programme.desc: The movie offers three stories of love and obsession. In the first tale, a young student with a voyeuristic habit spies on two of his female roommates. The second story follows an office manager who develops an infatuation for his secretary. The last story is a complex family drama about a debilitated father who forces his family to leave him.

programme.title: The Story of Sue San
programme.desc: TIn this Huangmei Opera romance, Wang is the son of a respected government official whereas Sue San is a famous prostitute. Although they love each other and seem to be perfectly matched, the two are worlds apart when it comes to social ranking, which will prove hard to overcome...

programme.title: Apartment For Ladies
programme.desc: A Taiwanese singer comes to Hong Kong in search for her missing younger sister, who had arrived in Hong Kong to be discovered as a nightclub singer. She finds lodging at an apartment for women run by a man-hating landlady, Mrs Chan. However, Mrs Chan cannot confine the young ladies' youthful vitality within the apartment.

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: Set in the Tang Dynasty, the 13 adopted sons of Sha Tuo King are all renowned as royal warriors. David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealously, leading to a gruesome family feud.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: Kuo, a police's son, blames his father for his mother's death. He has no job, spends time in night clubs and always gets into fights. One night, Kuo rescues Mei from being raped and they become friends. Kuo wants to support Mei and her family so he goes gambling hoping to gain more money but bad luck seems to be following them with tragic outcomes.

programme.title: The Convict Killer
programme.desc: After spending fifteen years in prison on trumped-up charges for drug smuggling, the martial arts master Teng Piao embarks on a journey to take revenge on the person who sets him up - “Black Leopard”. Unfortunately for Piao, no one knows the real identity of “Black Leopard”, except that there is a black leopard tattoo on his chest.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Uninhibited youth Chun meets a rich girl Wen when her car breaks down and drives her home. Chun falls in love with Wen but Wen's brother dislikes him and forbids his sister to see him. He humiliates Chun and gets Chun beaten up, so Chun takes the pistol he has found accidentally on the street to Wen's home and shoots her brother dead.

programme.title: Full Moon Scimitar
programme.desc: Swordsman Ding fought against many swordsmen and won, so he took his first defeat badly and wanted to commit suicide. It is then that he meets the granddaughter of a mystic Sect leader and falls in love. When they want to get married, the Sect leader presents Ding with the “Full Moon Scimitar”, on the condition that he will never leave the sect.

programme.title: Boxer Rebellion
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager Cixi believes the Boxers' claim that they have developed a kung fu that makes them impervious to weapons, thus declaring war against the alliances of eight foreign nations. The lack of weapons and good leadership in the Ching government allows the Eight Nation Alliances to take down Beijing.

programme.title: Call to Arms
programme.desc: The aggressive and dangerous Chin Empire conquers the hard-put Chao kingdom while the Wei empire is drained of its heroes and paralyzed by an indecisive ruler. Adventure, intrigue, death and tragedy reigns before the triumphant clash of the armies.

programme.title: Between Tears and Smiles
programme.desc: Fan Jia Shu is a kind-hearted student who is smitten with Shen, a heart-rending love song singer. However, he is not the only one who has eyes for Shen. The General's henchmen are also determined to present the songstress to their superior as a gift. Fan receives help from an unexpected person just in time to save the woman he loves.

programme.title: Panda Plan
programme.desc: After legendary kung fu star Jackie Chan adopts the panda Hu Hu, an international crime syndicate places a massive bounty on the bear. Joined by his agent and Hu Hu's caretaker, Jackie embarks on a daring quest to outsmart the villains.

programme.title: All's Well End's Well (Extended Version)
programme.desc: In this beloved Hong Kong comedy, the three Chang brothers living with their parents learn that love blossoms with nurture, but withers when taken for granted through haste, deceit, and selfishness. This extended version features an additional shootout scene that was omitted from the original theatrical release during Lunar New Year 2016.

programme.title: Old Fox
programme.desc: In 1989, young Liao Jie and his father save for a home, unaware of rising property prices. Frustrated by poverty, he learns from their landlord Old Fox who teaches him survival in society. Liao Jie ends up hurting Old Fox with what he has learnt, but his empathy prevents him from becoming like Old Fox.

programme.title: The Brotherhood of Rebel
programme.desc: Chai, a triad member, helps his childhood friend Meow flee Hong Kong after discovering that Meow attempted to kill his triad boss. 17 years later, Chai becomes a key member of the triad. When he runs into Meow one day, he knows that his gang will kill Meow if they find him. Caught between triad and brotherhood, what will Chai choose?

programme.title: Everything Under Control
programme.desc: During a diamond heist, one of the security escorts, Jelly, steals the diamonds and flees. Fellow security escorts, Yau Shing and Penguin, are forced to help the robber track down the diamonds. They stumble onto a remote village along the way, encountering strange villagers and mysterious incidents. Can they finally locate Jelly and the diamonds?

programme.title: Silent Code
programme.desc: Reporter Lan is tasked to research news from the internet, and stumbles across a popular BBS forum, Dream Board. The forum founder Xiang, creates space for netizens to share dreams and ideas, but ends up being the subject of a heated debate due to a leaked video. As Lan digs for the truth, she finds that things more complicated than they seem...

programme.title: The Vanished Murderer
programme.desc: Set in Northern China in 1932, inmate Fu Yuan escapes from prison by digging a tunnel with a silver spoon. Inspector Song Dong Lu is assigned to investigate the case. Following letters sent by Fu, Song travels to Hong City to uncover the mystery behind her disappearance, facing deeper conspiracies along the way.

programme.title: Lonely Eighteen
programme.desc: Set in the 1980s Hong Kong, Elaine and her best friend Ying enter the entertainment industry hoping to change their fates from poverty. Ying soon becomes a popular porn star but Elaine is lost between being her true self and an actress. When show business declines after a decade, their choices lead them to two different paths in life.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Wolf Pack squad led by Lao Diao, is a foreign-based team that specializes in overseas security jobs. In one of the missions, the squad discovers that a terrorist force is planning to destroy the country's energy source. Lao Diao is now entrusted with the task of leading his squad to fight back. Can the Wolf Pack save the day?

programme.title: Out of Order
programme.desc: A successful lawyer's secret affair turns into a nightmare when a corpse unexpectedly turns up in the hotel room, triggering a desperate cover-up that spirals into uncontrollable chaos.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist- The Return Of Chen Zhen
programme.desc: Chen Zhen (Donnie Yen) vanished and was supposedly dead. He actually left China and joined the Allied war effort on the European battlefields. While China is traumatized by military cliques during the Warlord Era in the 1920s, Japan has grown into the most powerful foreign national group there in Shanghai. Chen Zhen returns to Shanghai in the guise of a young entrepreneur in order to infiltrate Club Casablanca, whose owner Tycoon Liu (Anthony Wong) is suspected of collusion with the Japanese. He soon wins the trust of Liu while falling in love with the gorgeous club singer Kiki (Shu Qi). Meanwhile, Japanese general Chikaraishi (Kohata Ryu) comes to Shanghai with his assassination squad, subjecting the city to his reign of terror. Donning a black mask to avoid exposing his real identity, Chen Zhen secretly works with police captain Huang (Huang Bo) to protect the Chinese patriots from the Japanese assassins, as the hope of a nation rests on his deadly fists...

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: Locksmith Master Shan suffers from dementia and passes on his skills to Hao Ren, who surpasses him. Detective Liu often seeks Hao Ren's help and they become good friends. When Hao Ren reunites with an old friend one day, he accidentally unfolds the truth behind Shan's wife's disappearance, leading to a chain of mysterious events.

programme.title: All Suspects
programme.desc: A policeman on leave checks into a B&B, sharing the space with a detective novelist, a homeless drifter and a pianist. However, when the owner and the receptionist are found dead, the peaceful retreat turns into a web of suspicion and deceit. Each guest becomes both suspect and sleuth—each guarding a secret that could unravel the entire mystery.

programme.title: WE12
programme.desc: An underground organization, “The League of Kaito” has been maintaining international order. While 12 elite members possess extraordinary skills and have worked independently for a period of time, they must rekindle their long-lost team spirit to accomplish a mission together to save the world from disaster.

programme.title: WE12
programme.desc: An underground organization, “The League of Kaito” has been maintaining international order. While 12 elite members possess extraordinary skills and have worked independently for a period of time, they must rekindle their long-lost team spirit to accomplish a mission together to save the world from disaster.

programme.title: The Narrow Road
programme.desc: Chak, a small cleaning company owner, hits tough times during the pandemic. In need of an assistant, he hires a young single mother Candy, who unexpectedly helps him solve many difficulties at work. While life seems to get back on track, a series of cruel realities happen again, but they still bond together to support each other on the narrow road.

programme.title: Crisis Negotiators
programme.desc: Negotiator Wai becomes the prime suspect in a police murder case. He takes hostages at the police station and demands to negotiate with former negotiator Jun. As the two engage in a high-stake battle of wits, their expertise in psychological manipulation leads to a tense verbal sparring match, gradually shifting their positions and mind sets.

programme.title: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Based on a true event of a news investigative unit receiving a tip-off about the abuse of residents in an Elderly and Disabled Care Home. To expose the home's wrongdoings, reporter Kay goes undercover to expose the inhumanity and unveil the cruel truth under broad daylight.

programme.title: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Office lady Zhou Ran falls victim to an online dating love scam and is cheated of 550,000 yuan. Following faint clues left by the scammer, Zhou Ran comes to a small coastal town and encounters two young men. She gradually discovers that these two men have hidden the clues of the scam, and sets out on her revenge plan.

programme.title: The Bride With White Hair
programme.desc: As Wudang disciple Zhuo Yi Hang confronts the Demon Palace, he reunites with Lian Ni Shang, the woman who once saved him, and their love reignites. Lian, a disciple of the Demon Palace, endures torment to be with Zhuo but is shattered when he accidentally injures her. A fierce battle between good and evil unfolds!

programme.title: The Calling Of A Bus Driver
programme.desc: A girl named Suki fulfills her dream of being a bus driver after breaking up with her boyfriend, who has an affair with her good friend. When Suki is invited to attend her ex-boyfriend's wedding, she is presented with a chance for revenge - will she take it and turn her life around?

programme.title: All Suspects
programme.desc: A policeman on leave checks into a B&B, sharing the space with a detective novelist, a homeless drifter and a pianist. However, when the owner and the receptionist are found dead, the peaceful retreat turns into a web of suspicion and deceit. Each guest becomes both suspect and sleuth—each guarding a secret that could unravel the entire mystery.

programme.title: Z Storm
programme.desc: ICAC Chief Officer Luk is on the case of a corrupt policeman but finds all key witnesses killed when he starts to discover some clues. As investigation continues, Luk uncovers the fraud scheme of an organized corrupt group involving the government's $15 billion 'Care Fund'. He must fight against them to keep Hong Kong corruption free.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao is sent by a revolutionary group to be a spy in the imperial palace and find “The Sutra of 42 Chapters”. Xiao Bao soon befriends Emperor Kang Xi but must carry out his mission at the same time, so he is caught between two camps.

programme.title: Dragon Tiger Gate
programme.desc: Adapted from a famous Hong Kong comic, Tiger Wong is ambushed after he unwittingly took the Lousha Plaque but is saved by his brother Dragon Wong. They also befriended Turbo Shek during the fight and the trio forms a brotherhood. To avenge the death of the Dragon Gate masters, they train and vow to defeat Shibumi, the leader of Lousha Clan.

programme.title: Mama's Affair
programme.desc: Former talent manager Mei Fung stays home to take care of her husband and son after retirement. She decides to re-enter the entertainment business to find her value in life, and successfully transforms a local restaurant delivery boy, Fong Ching, into a young pop idol. This makes her teenage son, Jonathan, intensely jealous of Fong Ching.

programme.title: Ride On
programme.desc: Master Luo, a washed-up stuntman, trains his beloved horse “Red Hare” to be a stunt horse. Due to his debts though, “Red Hare” may be taken away by the debtors. Master Luo has no choice but to seek help from his estranged daughter, and the incident ends up becoming a golden opportunity for them to reconcile.

programme.title: Turns We Take
programme.desc: A spicy hot pot restaurant in Northeast China serves different types of customers every day. Amongst them are a sweet young couple, two wayward young men and a taxi driver. Despite being complete strangers to each other, their lives are intertwined by a traffic accident…

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what's happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin

programme.title: Dabbe Dab6e
programme.desc: Mengisahkan enam individu yang terperangkap dalam teror jin akibat amalan sihir dan perjanjian lama. Gangguan semakin kejam apabila dosa silam terbongkar, memaksa mereka berdepan kerasukan, ritual hitam dan balasan makhluk ghaib.

programme.title: Din Tiger EP6
programme.desc: Dalam usaha melarikan diri, Sina berjaya menewaskan dua konco tetapi akhirnya jatuh ke tangan Anat, manakala Elyn dihantui dengan kebimbangan akan kehadiran Sina.

programme.title: Mass Hysteria
programme.desc: Sekumpulan pelakon semula perbicaraan ahli sihir Salem mendapati diri mereka terjebak dalam pemburuan ahli sihir zaman moden.

programme.title: Zohak
programme.desc: Rustem ditangkap pada suatu petang oleh Jin yang sangat berbahaya. Selepas membunuh isterinya di hadapan anak perempuannya yang berusia enam tahun Canan, dia memenjarakan Jin dalam kotak dan membuangnya jauh ke dalam tasik. Tidak tahan dengan kesilapannya, Rustem membunuh dirinya di hadapan anak perempuannya. Canan, yang cuba melupakan apa yang dialaminya selama ini, sedang membuat persiapan untuk berkahwin dengan menjalinkan cinta yang hebat dengan Semih. Dia memberikan Canan sebuah kotak yang rakan-rakannya secara tidak sengaja ditemui di tepi tasik sebagai hadiah hari jadi, dan keadaan menjadi luar biasa.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP16
programme.desc: Saiful Azmi Pengantara Detik 12 Malam dengan dibantu krew produksi melakukan penyiasatan tentang kisah misteri yang berlaku di Bandar Tasek Puteri, Rawang, Selangor. Tasek ini pernah di terokai sebagai pusat perlombongan satu masa lalu. Menurut Haji Fadzil Hanapie dan Shiriman Hakim Razali penduduk asal kawasan tersebut, mereka pernah ternampak mengalami peristiwa menyeramkan dan menakut bertemu dengan lembaga misteri dan sekumpulan lembaga berjubah putih yang dikatakn Bunian. Pengantara bersama krew kemudiannya melakukan penyiasatan dengan berada di lokasi tersebut selepas 12 malam. Pengantara sendiri mengalami kejadian seram apabila terhidu bau wangi bunga rampai dan dapat merasakan kehadiran lembaga misteri sebagai perkampungan Orang Bunian.

programme.title: Din Tiger EP6
programme.desc: Dalam usaha melarikan diri, Sina berjaya menewaskan dua konco tetapi akhirnya jatuh ke tangan Anat, manakala Elyn dihantui dengan kebimbangan akan kehadiran Sina.

programme.title: Ganjil
programme.desc: Nabila dan Amry mengetahui bahawa mereka pernah bertemu tiga tahun lalu di dunia nyata. Teruja dengan peluang untuk akhirnya berjumpa semula, mereka merancang pertemuan.

programme.title: Zerk
programme.desc: Fatma, yang kehilangan anak perempuannya akibat lemas di tasik, selepas beberapa ketika, menyangka bahawa anak perempuannya belum meninggal dunia dan mengambil anak perempuannya dari kuburnya dan membawanya pulang. Wanita itu, yang hilang keseimbangan mental pada siang hari, membunuh diri dengan menggantung diri.

programme.title: Obsesi Dia EP13
programme.desc: Alia menyalahkan Ritz serta Dr Flora kerana menukar dan merahsiakan identitinya. Dia kesal seolah-olah dirinya dipermainkan walaupun setelah Ritz menjelaskan untuk keselamatan. Zacky mencari jalan untuk meyakin Alia dia tidak lagi berdendam terhadap Affiyah. Semetara itu rahsia Sophie mempergunakan Dr Zahir untuk memisahkan Affiyah dengan Zacky terbongkar. Adam dan Rafeeq sebenarnya ahli keluarga yang dikhianati oleh Tan Seri Jalaludin. Mereka bergabung untuk menghapuskan musuh-musuh mereka termasuk Affiyah, saksi utama kejadian bunuh.Sementara itu Zacky dan Sha gembira melihat bapa mereka sedar dari koma. Kegembiraan mereka disaksikan Tan Seri Jalaludin secara bersembunyi

programme.title: Taxi 2
programme.desc: Duta Jepun sedang melawat Marseilles untuk melihat taktik anti-geng polis bandar. Semasa lawatan itu, bagaimanapun, dia diculik oleh kumpulan yang bekerja untuk yakuza Jepun. Pegawai muda Emilien berazam untuk menyelamatkan duta dan pegawai Petra (teman wanitanya), yang turut diculik, dan memulihkan kehormatan jabatannya. Sekali lagi, pemandu teksi syaitan laju Daniel (dari filem Teksi pertama) dipanggil untuk menyelamatkan hari dengan kemahiran memandu lajunya.

programme.title: The Equalizer S2 EP15
programme.desc: Kerja vigilante McCall merumitkan lagi kehidupan peribadinya apabila dia terpaksa meminta bantuan bekas suaminya, Dr. Miles Fulton, untuk membantu mangsa tembakan, salah seorang daripada dua wanita yang diburu pencuri selepas mereka menyaksikan rompakan.

programme.title: The Equalizer S2 EP16
programme.desc: Apabila Aunty Vi merupakan satu-satunya juri dalam perbicaraan pembunuhan yang percaya bahawa defendan tidak bersalah, McCall secara rahsia menyiasat kes itu untuk mencari bukti bahawa naluri Vi adalah betul.

programme.title: The Equalizer S2 EP17
programme.desc: Seorang psikik yang mengaku dirinya sendiri mendakwa adik perempuannya yang hilang berada dalam bahaya yang akan berlaku, menurut penglihatannya; Delilah bergelut di bawah beban menyimpan rahsia McCall.

programme.title: The Equalizer S2 EP18
programme.desc: Keazaman McCall untuk menangkap Mason Quinn, penjenayah yang bertanggungjawab atas kematian Bishop, membelok kepada obsesi berbahaya yang boleh menyebabkannya kehilangan segala-galanya.

programme.desc: Punisher dan Black Widow dihantar dalam misi untuk menghentikan Leviathan, sebuah organisasi pengganas global yang merancang untuk menjual teknologi S.H.I.E.L.D. yang dicuri kepada pembida tertinggi.

programme.title: Avengers Confidential: Black Widow & Punisher
programme.desc: Punisher dan Black Widow dihantar dalam misi untuk menghentikan Leviathan, sebuah organisasi pengganas global yang merancang untuk menjual teknologi S.H.I.E.L.D. yang dicuri kepada pembida tertinggi.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP3
programme.desc: Rancangan ini diterajui oleh pengantara Detik 12 Malam iaitu Saiful Azmi Jamsari serta dibantu oleh krew-krew produksi sebagai pembantu penyiasatan. Kali ini pengantara berada di Galaeri Perfileman yang ditubuhkan pada 2007 terletak di KL. Asalnya bangunan banglo tersebut adalah sebuah rumah keluarga. Galeri ini menyimpan peralatanperalatan lama perfileman untuk dipamerkan. Pengalaman misteri yang pernah dilalui oleh Encik Muhammad Rosli, penjaga galeri dikongsi bersama, beliau pernah beberapa kali terjumpa dengan lembaga wanita berambut panjang, pergerakan perkakasan dan bunyi yang menakutkan. Pengantara bersama krew kemudiannya melakukan penyiasatan, mereka berada di situ selepas 12 malam. Mereka sendiri mengalami situasi yang hampir sama saperti diceritakan.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP3
programme.desc: Rancangan ini diterajui oleh pengantara Detik 12 Malam iaitu Saiful Azmi Jamsari serta dibantu oleh krew-krew produksi sebagai pembantu penyiasatan. Kali ini pengantara berada di Galaeri Perfileman yang ditubuhkan pada 2007 terletak di KL. Asalnya bangunan banglo tersebut adalah sebuah rumah keluarga. Galeri ini menyimpan peralatanperalatan lama perfileman untuk dipamerkan. Pengalaman misteri yang pernah dilalui oleh Encik Muhammad Rosli, penjaga galeri dikongsi bersama, beliau pernah beberapa kali terjumpa dengan lembaga wanita berambut panjang, pergerakan perkakasan dan bunyi yang menakutkan. Pengantara bersama krew kemudiannya melakukan penyiasatan, mereka berada di situ selepas 12 malam. Mereka sendiri mengalami situasi yang hampir sama saperti diceritakan.

programme.title: Din Tiger EP7
programme.desc: Tan Sri Alif menghadapi krisis akibat kesilapan Anat yang semakin merumitkan operasi, ini menyebabkan Lai Chee berasa kecewa dan marah, dibelenggu dengan konflik emosi.

programme.title: Munafik 2
programme.desc: Dihantui oleh penglihatan menakutkan, seorang penyembuh muslim mendapati imannya diuji apabila membatu seorang perempuan yang terkurung didalam pertempuran, tubuh dan jiwa dengan seorang pemimpin yang jahat.

programme.title: Bisikan Syaitan
programme.desc: Pasangan Kamil dan Soraya mengikat perjanjian berdarah dengan kuasa jahat demi kemewahan, tetapi apabila Soraya ditangkap atas kes pembunuhan, rahsia mereka mula terbongkar dan gangguan ghaib menimpa keluarga.

programme.title: Din Tiger EP7
programme.desc: Tan Sri Alif menghadapi krisis akibat kesilapan Anat yang semakin merumitkan operasi, ini menyebabkan Lai Chee berasa kecewa dan marah, dibelenggu dengan konflik emosi.

programme.title: Ganjil
programme.desc: Dunia mimpi tidak lagi menjadi tempat yang menenangkan, manakala dunia nyata terasa lebih menakutkan. Nabila dan Amry mula tertanya-tanya sama ada takdir sedang mempermainkan mereka dengan kejam.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP3
programme.desc: Rancangan ini diterajui oleh pengantara Detik 12 Malam iaitu Saiful Azmi Jamsari serta dibantu oleh krew-krew produksi sebagai pembantu penyiasatan. Kali ini pengantara berada di Galaeri Perfileman yang ditubuhkan pada 2007 terletak di KL. Asalnya bangunan banglo tersebut adalah sebuah rumah keluarga. Galeri ini menyimpan peralatanperalatan lama perfileman untuk dipamerkan. Pengalaman misteri yang pernah dilalui oleh Encik Muhammad Rosli, penjaga galeri dikongsi bersama, beliau pernah beberapa kali terjumpa dengan lembaga wanita berambut panjang, pergerakan perkakasan dan bunyi yang menakutkan. Pengantara bersama krew kemudiannya melakukan penyiasatan, mereka berada di situ selepas 12 malam. Mereka sendiri mengalami situasi yang hampir sama saperti diceritakan.

programme.title: Onrust
programme.desc: Bramanto Putra, seorang pelajar arkeologi, menemui sebuah buku nota purba di Pulau Onrust yang telah tertimbus selama 300 tahun.

programme.title: Sosok Ketiga
programme.desc: Apabila Nuri menerima Yuni yang merupakan sahabat baiknya, sebagai madunya, dia mencetuskan siri supernatural dan konflik mendalam bagi memenangi semula cinta hati suaminya.

programme.title: Dabbe Bir Cin Vakasi
programme.desc: Rumah sebuah keluarga di Turki dirasuk roh jahat yang ingin membunuh manusia.

programme.title: Zerk
programme.desc: Fatma, yang kehilangan anak perempuannya akibat lemas di tasik, selepas beberapa ketika, menyangka bahawa anak perempuannya belum meninggal dunia dan mengambil anak perempuannya dari kuburnya dan membawanya pulang. Wanita itu, yang hilang keseimbangan mental pada siang hari, membunuh diri dengan menggantung diri.

programme.title: Black S2 EP8
programme.desc: Black dan Sofia keluar janji temu seharian. Tapi kebahagiaan hilang apabila 007 dan 416 membawa berita buruk buat Black - orang atasan tidak gembira dengan kurangnya kemajuan yang dibuat oleh Black. Borhan telah membuat penemuan yang mengerikan dan dia menyedari yang dia akhirnya telah menemui bukti muktamad. Semuanya tertuju ke arah seseorang yang dia syak selama ini, tapi dia membuat satu lagi penemuan yang sangat mengejutkan.

programme.title: Avengers Confidential: Black Widow & Punisher
programme.desc: Punisher dan Black Widow dihantar dalam misi untuk menghentikan Leviathan, sebuah organisasi pengganas global yang merancang untuk menjual teknologi S.H.I.E.L.D. yang dicuri kepada pembida tertinggi.

programme.title: Obsesi Dia EP13
programme.desc: Alia menyalahkan Ritz serta Dr Flora kerana menukar dan merahsiakan identitinya. Dia kesal seolah-olah dirinya dipermainkan walaupun setelah Ritz menjelaskan untuk keselamatan. Zacky mencari jalan untuk meyakin Alia dia tidak lagi berdendam terhadap Affiyah. Semetara itu rahsia Sophie mempergunakan Dr Zahir untuk memisahkan Affiyah dengan Zacky terbongkar. Adam dan Rafeeq sebenarnya ahli keluarga yang dikhianati oleh Tan Seri Jalaludin. Mereka bergabung untuk menghapuskan musuh-musuh mereka termasuk Affiyah, saksi utama kejadian bunuh.Sementara itu Zacky dan Sha gembira melihat bapa mereka sedar dari koma. Kegembiraan mereka disaksikan Tan Seri Jalaludin secara bersembunyi

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon "Accident Man", adalah pembunuh dingin, dia adalah yang terbaik dalam apa yang dia lakukan. Tetapi apabila orang yang disayangi diseret ke dunia bawah tanah London dan dibunuh oleh krewnya sendiri, Fallon terpaksa merobek kehidupan yang dia tahu untuk membalas dendam kepada orang yang sebenarnya bermakna kepadanya.

programme.title: Ganjil
programme.desc: Nabila dan Amry bertemu semula dalam mimpi tapi kali ini, mereka berada lebih lama daripada yang sepatutnya. Sekarang mereka mesti berdepan dengan luka dalam mereka dan akhirnya memahami takdir yang telah ditentukan buat mereka.

programme.title: Obsesi Dia EP14
programme.desc: Adam menyiasat kes kehilangan Nora. Suspek utama ialah Dr Zahir berdasarkan mimpi Alia.Dr Flora mengizinkan Alia dan Susan membawa Adam ke rumah Dr Zahir. Mereka pelik melihat Dr Zahir pulang bersama Sophie.Mereka menyelinap masuk dan mengesyaki sesuatu. Nyawa Sophie terancam apabila terjumpa mayat mangsa-mangsa Zahir dalam sebuah bilik. Berlaku perselisihan antara mereka yang jelas didengar oleh Adam,Alia dan Susan. Perselisihan itu menyebabkan Sophie dibunuh. Rahsia dia mengupah Dr Zakir untuk membunuh Alia dan Kai turut terbongkar.Dr Zahir dapat menghidu kehadiran Alia dan Susan. Dalam situasi berasingan Ritz didera dan diancam bunuh oleh seorang lelaki bertopeng

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP21
programme.desc: Memaparkan pengantara Detik 12 Malam saudara Saiful Azmi Jamsari melakukan penyiasatan tentang kisah misteri yang berlaku di Klang, Selangor. Thevasayagam @ Deva Sasi seorang pengusaha Perkhidmatan Pengebumian kaum India beragama Hindu bersama pekerjanya Thirwarasan berkongsi maklumat mengenai khidmat syarikat imereka. Manakala Ganesan a/l Balakrishnan, Pembantu Tadbir di MPK yang mengurus Krematorium di Klang pernah mendengar bunyi yang menakutkan saperti ada orang yang menarik besi penarik abu. Manakala Narayanasamy seorang Sami berkongsi pengalaman budak menangis, kawasan kubur Hindu. Pengantara bersama krew kemudiannya melakukan penyiasatan dengan berada di lokasi tersebut selepas detik 12 malam. Pengantara sendiri mengalami mendengar suara ketawa dan menakutkan semasa berada di Krematorium dan tanah perkuburan.

programme.title: JEJAK RASUL 3
programme.desc: Jejak Rasul mengunjungi bandar Granada dan bandar kecil iaitu Mocklin dan Acala di mana terdapat kota kubu Islam yang strategi dan merupakan tempat terakhir kejatuhan kerajaan Islam.

programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: In the wake of the previous episode, the magical creatures have all vanished and the world at large has gone gray. Desperate to fix things, the crew travels to the Magical Realm to confront the omniscient Great Watcher, who was a tempting offer for Yi. The kids manage to retrieve creatures, but being back in the human world is sapping them of their magical energy. Feeling responsible, Yi embarks on a dangerous mission to save everyone - but it's the community of creatures and humans alike that instead come to Yi's rescue. Together, they realize that their connections to one another are the most powerful magic of all.

programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: Following the events of the feature, Yi struggles to recreate her violin magic without Everest. programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: The so-called maintenance of Mr. Towes' desk combined with an opinionated new substitute teacher have Birch convinced her favourite-teacher-ever has been exiled. What Birch doesn't know is that Mr. Towes is just preferring privacy and the new sub is a good friend.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Competition gets in the way of raising awareness for an endangered species when Birch and Sandra take up the exact same cause. What starts out as a campaign to help the environment turns into a full-blown fish fiasco as the two girls refuse to cooperate.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence puts Birch in the hot seat. A caricature of a less popular student is discovered and all eyes turn to resident Manganaki Birch Small. Soon court is in session and Birch is making her case before a jury of her peers. But proving her innocence isn't enough; Birch wants to know who's behind the pen.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: The twins are sure they have seen fairies in the garden and set out on a hunt to prove it to Fifi. Will they find any?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: The twins inadvertently ruin Fifi's garden while playing a game. Can they and the other tots make it better before Fifi finds out?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose can't make her garden grow and turns to Fifi for advice. She is amazed when Fifi points out that you need to water and weed a garden. And surely she can't really mean putting that yucky compost everywhere can she?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose and Violet are having a sleepover. When Bumble admits that he is scared of the dark, the tots try everything to stop him from being afraid

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Fifi and Bumble deliver lots of delicious honey to Poppy's stall. They lose a pot on the way and there isn't enough to go round. Can they find the missing pot, or will Stingo have to go without his honey for tea?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Poppy is having a line dancing party, but none of the other flowertots know how to do it. Will any of them learn to dance in time or will Poppy have to cancel the party?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Aunt Tulip has lost Grubby again. When Stingo finds him, he asks to be made King as a reward. It isn't long before he has gone too far and the tots are all fed up with his demands. Can Fifi get life in the garden back to normal?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: The tots are playing hide and seek and the winner will get Fifi's delicious jam tarts. Who will win, Stingo and Slugsy are sure it will be them!

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: On the looooong drive to Grandma's house, Olivia finds ways to pass the time. She imagines her family traveling in style, as she pilots her very own jumbo jet-Olivia Air! By the time they arrive at Grandma's, Olivia's had so much fun that the discomfort of the road trip has been forgotten.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: When asked to give a presentation for her class's International Day. Olivia can't decide which country to choose. Being Olivia she invents her own country -Olivitania -where cupcakes are the national food and the national anthem sounds suspiciously like Puccini.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.desc: Lured into an empty hotel where a baby has supposedly gone missing, the team is trapped by Crispin Biscuits, a chaotic British schoolboy baby who's been hired to wreck Boss and Tina's lives. Crispin puts the new company's loyalty to a test in a series of fiendish puzzling mind games, all with the threat of constant balloon popping (horrible for baby ears!)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Our team's startup company and their rivals at Baby Corp get in a “Space Race”, competing to see who can make the cutest kiddie-pretend “moon landing” for a baby - a spectacle sure to bring in a bounty of Baby Love. With both companies pouring their resources into a simulated space take off, tempers and sabotage are running hot, and the scrappy little startup is in danger of getting crushed by their big business competitor.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Tired of the Melvins ruling the school, the boys realize that they need Mr. Krupp to make the school at least bearable. Unfortunately, Krupp has run off to Ecuador to look for a fabled fountain. So the boys form the M.I.S.F.A.R.T.S. - Mega Incredible Search Force Adventure Rescue Team Squad - to travel to Ecuador and bring Krupp back, whether he wants it or not.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela's mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela's true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn't doing all of this for the money - she's doing it for family.

programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve's base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth's major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve - a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded - is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve's missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.desc: A bummed out Tina takes a vacation to the baby resort, Floaties! However, her mind is still back at work, and struggled to actually enjoy her vacation. programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits heists the underwater Baby Bank in an attempt to steal all the funds from Boss and Tina's new company. programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: While Yi and the crew try to pinpoint how Yi's magic works, they notice that Everest isn't looking too hot. In fact, he's too hot. The crew tries everything to cool him down, even begging their old foe, Burnish, for help. Out of options, Yi tries to use her magic to send Everest home - until Burnish and his jerboa sidekick, Duchess, reveal that they've made over the kids' rooftop fort into a high-tech HQ, complete with various tech gadgets for the crew and a temperature-controlled chamber for Everest.

programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: An earth-shaking rumble signals the arrival of a new creature, but Yi and Jin butt heads, each convinced they're the better team leader. The crew eventually discovers that the massive Sewer Koi is behind the earthquakes, but he's missing his precious pearl, the key to a magical underground dam. Without it, the sewer's water levels will rise, threatening to overflow and flood the whole city! It's going to take a heist to extract the pearl from its display at a local museum, before it's too late.
