programme.title: Sahabat Backpackers
programme.desc: Memaparkan Dai Raisyah dan Dai Shafiqah sebagai hos rancangan mengembara ke Aceh, Indonesia. Banda Aceh telah dilanda Tsunami pada 29 Disember 2004, telah mengorbankan seramai 46,718 penduduknya. Lokasi pertama yang dikunjungi ialah Kuburan Massal. Seramai 46, 718 mangsa terkorban mangsa Tsunami telah dikebumikan di sini. Saudara Irfan Kamal salah seorang pelajar Malaysia di sini menceritakan detik-detik berlaku Tsunami. Katanya dalam keadaan dharurat, mereka yang meninggal dunia boleh dikebumikan secara beramai-ramai. Terdapat sebuah bot tersangkut pada sebuah rumah dan masih dikekalkan, bot ini telah menyelamatkan 59 orang. Hos mengunjungi keluarga Syaifun Muhammad Yusri dan isterinya Puan Nilawati Ilyas yang merupakan mangsa tsumani. Mereka menceritakan detik-detik kejadian sehingga kehilangan ibu dan anak mereka. Pelancong Malaysia telah mewakafkan sebidang tanah dan pembinaan masjid di sana. Masih terdapat sebuah masjid masih ampuh dan tidak terkesan dengan kejadian tsunami iaitu Masjid Tahmatullah. Seterusnya ke Masjid Agung Al-Makmur Lampriek. Pada setiap hujung minggu jalan raya ditutup bagi membolehkan penduduk beriadah dan bersenam. Hos juga mengunjungi kapal besar yang dinamakan Rumah Apung. Kapal ini menjadi sebagai sumber menjana letrik kepada orang kampung terletak di tepi pantai. Kapal ini sepanjang 63 meter mampu 1.5 kilo watt letrik.

programme.title: Kembara
programme.desc: Bersama Hos, Shahrul Kamal membawa penonton mengembara dan mencuba pelbagai aktiviti luar di Canopy Villa Nuang Hill, Janda Baik, Pahang

programme.title: Nur
programme.desc: Hamadi marah tindakan Datuk Mukhsin apabila menempatkan Adam bekerja di Darul Mukhsin tanpa berunding dengannya. Datin Musalmah mulai menyukai Nur, hatinya terdetik selepas mendengar kisah pertemuan Nur dengan Adam

programme.title: Nur
programme.desc: Video temu bual Datuk Mukhsin mengenai perkahwinan Adam dengan Nur perempuan lorong telah disiarkan oleh media, Datuk Mukhsin mengaku merestui perkahwinan tersebut. Nur kemudiannya telah disahkan hamil, dan keluarga Adam gembira.

programme.title: Nur
programme.desc: Datin Musalmah tidak membenarkan Nur menemui ibunya Mona sekali pun Adam telah mengizinkannya. Hamadi tiba di rumah Datuk Mukhsin selepas diminta untuk berbincang masalah kewangan Darul Mukhsin.

programme.title: Nur
programme.desc: Nur masih merahsiakan perbuatan kakak iparnya Aishah daripada pengetahuan keluarga Adam. Qhadeeja syak sesuatu berlaku kepada Adam yang menyebabkan Adam tiba-tiba menjadi begitu benci kepada Nur.

programme.title: Tinta Syurga
programme.desc: Dokumentari istimewa ini membawa penonton melihat misi menghasilkan mushaf (naskhah al-Quran bertulis tangan) untuk percetakan al-Quran di Malaysia. Ia berkongsi tentang proses penerbitan dan penerbitan al-Quran yang perlu melalui pelbagai peringkat tapisan.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: Elizabeth Halsey ialah seorang guru sekolah menengah yang pemalas dan hanya mahu hidup mewah dengan suami kaya. Selepas pertunangan dibatalkan, dia terpaksa kembali mengajar dan cuba memikat guru gantian kaya, Scott Delacorte, sambil bersaing dengan guru berdedikasi Amy Squirrel. Untuk mendapatkan bonus mengajar, Elizabeth mula menggunakan cara pelik dan tidak etis, sekali gus mencetuskan kekacauan di sekolah.

programme.title: Sahabat Backpackers
programme.desc: Memaparkan Dai Raisyah dan Dai Shafiqah sebagai hos rancangan mengembara ke Aceh, Indonesia. Banda Aceh telah dilanda Tsunami pada 29 Disember 2004, telah mengorbankan seramai 46,718 penduduknya. Lokasi pertama yang dikunjungi ialah Kuburan Massal. programme.title: Kembara
programme.desc: Bersama Hos, Shahrul Kamal membawa penonton mengembara dan mencuba pelbagai aktiviti luar di Canopy Villa Nuang Hill, Janda Baik, Pahang

programme.title: Huru Hara
programme.desc: Di hoskan oleh Anas Ridzuan, Huru Hara kali ini pasti membuatkan anda terhibur sambil bergelak ketawa. Dalam episod ini kita santai santai bersama Keka Nizam, Nesa Idrus, M Shafuan & Fugo.

programme.title: Ayahanda Ibrah Ramadan
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Ayahanda Ibrah, seorang lelaki tua yang dihormati di kampungnya kerana sifatnya yang tegas, berprinsip dan mementingkan nilai agama dalam kehidupan. Namun, sikap kerasnya sering disalah ertikan oleh anak-anaknya yang telah dewasa dan membawa haluan hidup masing-masing. Ketika Ramadan menjelma, Ayahanda Ibrah cuba menyatukan kembali keluarganya yang retak dan mengharapkan keinsafan serta perubahan dalam diri mereka. Dalam bulan penuh keberkatan ini, pelbagai ujian dan cabaran menguji kasih sayang serta pengorbanan seorang bapa.

programme.title: Tok Guru
programme.desc: Gabenor Inggeris risau Malayan Union akan gagal jika orang Melayu terus buat demostrasi. Za'aba, Ahmad Boestamam dan Dr Baharudin Helmi terus berceramah di seluruh pelusuk tanah Melayu memberi penjelasan keburukkan jika orang melayu menerima Malayan Union.

programme.title: Tok Guru
programme.desc: Gabenor Inggeris risau Malayan Union akan gagal jika orang Melayu terus buat demostrasi. Za'aba, Ahmad Boestamam dan Dr Baharudin Helmi terus berceramah di seluruh pelusuk tanah Melayu memberi penjelasan keburukkan jika orang melayu menerima Malayan Union.

programme.title: Mr Delicious
programme.desc: Di luar negara, konflik perasaan semakin hangat. Ketiga-tiga sahabat merenung kembali komitmen dan masa depan mereka.

programme.title: Mr Delicious
programme.desc: Di luar negara, konflik perasaan semakin hangat. Ketiga-tiga sahabat merenung kembali komitmen dan masa depan mereka.

programme.title: Adiwiraku
programme.desc: Adiwiraku berdasarkan kisah benar guru Cheryl Ann Fernando dan perjuangan serta kejayaannya mengajar di sebuah sekolah luar bandar di Kedah. Penggambaran sepenuhnya di Sungai Petani, Adiwiraku menghidupkan kisah SMK Pinang Tunggal dan bagaimana pelajarnya berusaha ke arah pertandingan choral speaking.

programme.title: Pembancuh Kopi Mr Vampire
programme.desc: Irsyad memulakan proses rawatannya dengan bantuan seorang kaunselor iaitu DR. NADYA. Dr. Nadya adalah pakar kaunseling yang dipanggil khas untuk membuat sesi kanseling kepada mangsa-mangsa kemalangan yang menjalani fisioterapi. Di kampung, Nuzul menjalani kehidupan seperti biasa. Segala rasa rindu, luka dan kesedihan hanya disimpan sendirian. Walaupun dia tersenyum riang, namun kesedihan Nuzul dirasai oleh Nuha, Nurin dan Nazrul. Satu hari, Dr. Nadya didatangi Puan Sri Ayuni dan dia meminta Dr. Nadya membantu Irsyad melupakan Nuzul. Dr. Nadya terkejut.

programme.title: Mr Delicious
programme.desc: Di luar negara, konflik perasaan semakin hangat. Ketiga-tiga sahabat merenung kembali komitmen dan masa depan mereka.

programme.title: Kerana Cinta Itu Dusta
programme.desc: Selepas kejayaan besar jualan lipmate pertama, Sufian mula berubah apabila wang dan perhatian mula menaikkan egonya. Dia mahu hidup lebih mewah, tetapi Orked lebih berhati-hati demi kestabilan keluarga. Ketegangan semakin ketara apabila Zaleha terus memanipulasi Sufian dengan isu “suami hilang kuasa” dalam rumah tangga.

programme.title: Saat Aku Tahu
programme.desc: Kemarahan Ameena semakin memuncak manakala Zarif bergelut untuk mendapatkan semula kepercayaannya. Kesetiaan Harris yang tenang memaksa Ameena untuk mempersoalkan apa sebenarnya erti cinta dan pengabdian. Sementara itu, keputusasaan Maria membawanya ke jalan yang lebih gelap

programme.title: Dapur Bujang Ramadan 2024
programme.desc: Chef Naem yang akan berkongsi menu masakan yang mudah dan enak sempena bulan Ramadan. Dalam episod kali ini, Chef akan menyediakan Ayam Tauhu Sos Tiram dan Sardin Masak Lemak.

programme.title: Bakar Ramadan 2024
programme.desc: Untuk episod kali ini, Chef Kim akan berkongsi dengan penonton, cara menyediakan Pie Kari Ayam & Pie Apple Rastik.

programme.title: Lelaki Melayu Terakhir
programme.desc: Jazlan membawa Qasih bersiar-siar dan ziarah ke tempat-tempat pelancongan di sekitar Mekah. Di Madinah, Jazlan meneruskan tanggung jawabnya menjadi "guide" untuk Qasih, membawanya menziarahi tempat-tempat ibadah dan tempat yang bersejarah. Pergaulan Jazlan dan Qasih setakat ini masih tidak menampakkan keserasian antara satu sama lain malah sikap Qasih sangat menguji akan kesabaran Jazlan begitu juga pandangan Qasih terhadap Jazlan

programme.title: Terima Kasih Ibu
programme.desc: Nil, seorang pelajar bermasalah, memukul rakan hingga maut. Ibunya yang menyebelahi dia mengabaikan nasihat guru. Selepas dibebaskan dari Sekolah Juvana, Nil terus terlibat jenayah dan dihukum berat. Kisah ini menyorot hubungan ibu-anak yang kompleks, pengabaian ibu bapa dan akibat tindakan anak bila tiada batas disiplin.

programme.title: Bakar Ramadan 2024
programme.desc: Untuk episod kali ini, Chef Kim akan berkongsi dengan penonton, cara menyediakan Pie Kari Ayam & Pie Apple Rastik.

programme.title: Saat Aku Tahu
programme.desc: Zarif dan Maria meneruskan hubungan terlarang mereka, tanpa menyedari Ameena memerhati. Zaidi menggesa Ameena pulang ke rumah, Ameena meminta bantuan daripada orang yang tidak dijangka dan merancang langkah seterusnya

programme.title: Lelaki Melayu Terakhir
programme.desc: Di hari terakhir Qasih di Madinah beliau cuba mencari restoran makanan melayu namun tidak kedapatan dan terpaksa juga menjamu dengan makanan arab tetapi malangnya setelah selesai makan Qasih tidak jumpa jalan balik ke hotel dan terpaksa mengganggu Jazlan yang sedang kuliah. Di waktu malamnya Jazlan membawa Qasih untuk masuk ke Raudah sebelum berangkat balik ke Malaysia esoknya. Di dalam kapal terbang balik ke tanah air, Qasih bermimpi bersama Jazlan menulis namanya di batu Jabal Rahmah

programme.title: Kerana Cinta Itu Dusta
programme.desc: Seri semakin rapat dengan keluarga Orked, mengambil hati Zaleha dan menjaga anak-anak mereka. Dia mula menonjol di media sosial bersama Sufian, menimbulkan rasa cemburu Sufian dan sedikit curiga Orked. Puan Lela masih mahu Seri kembali pada Arman, manakala Arman cemburu melihat Seri mesra dengan Sufian. Sufian mula keliru dengan perasaannya terhadap Seri, tanpa disedari Orked.

programme.title: Mr Delicious
programme.desc: Aiman terpaksa memilih terus bersama Melina atau kembali ke antara Zita, Zara dan Fina. Ketegangan emosi memuncak.

programme.title: Love, Now
programme.desc: Lan Shi De, who lost his first love in college, reunites with Yang Yi Ru in a foreign land. When he learns she has only six months to live, he decides to marry her and fulfill her dream wedding. Eight days later, she mysteriously disappears, and Shi De vows not to let true love slip away again.

programme.title: Stories In Taiwan
programme.desc: In a playful and relaxed style, the host went deep into the corners of various towns and villages in Taiwan, looking for the uniqueness, introduced the special local customs and traditions.

programme.title: Trails to Hakka
programme.desc: Taiwans Raknus Selu Trail, the countrys longest national nature trail, becomes the setting for a cross-cultural journey linking Taiwan and Korea. Led by Hakka artist Rio Peng and Korea-based YouTuber Baik Du, Korean artists Kim Ha Nel, Nam Wooh Yun, and Lee Jun Young explore the trail on foot, discovering its landscapes, culture, and healing power. YouTuber

programme.title: Girls Tease
programme.desc: This show focuses on the issues that are most important to urban modern women. It combines current events with discussions of life's major and minor problems and invites various specialists to address various difficulties. Netizens will occasionally attend the show to share their own stories and ask questions of the guests and experts, making the topics more relevant and audience-focused!

programme.title: Top Singers
programme.desc: The show 'Top Singers' aims to spotlight outstanding Taiwanese singers and composers, setting a new standard in the industry. Combining elements of competition, variety, and personal stories, the show welcomes participants of all ages. Its goals include discovering grassroots talent, innovating Taiwanese song performance styles, and involving more local talent in song composition to infuse new life into Taiwanese music.

programme.title: Show Biz
programme.desc: Every second counts in "Show Biz" to bring you with the most High Speed star news, exciting live shows and performers interviews.

Through lively food challenges, scenic explorations, and authentic local encounters, the hosts bring audiences closer to Taiwans diverse flavors and vibrant traditions.

programme.title: Mr.Player
programme.desc: Depending on the locations of the missions, Jacky Wu, the leader of the home team, invites various celebrities to take on challenges and bring you excitement every week.

programme.title: Rainy Night Flower
programme.desc: After leaving reformatory, Xin Xiong joins a gang to make a living and soon he becomes a leader of the gang. He takes protection fees from vendors and works hard to 'maintain the local order' in his way. He has thus developed a very good relationship with the law enforcement unit. Later, a teahouse owner Gui Zhu has fallen in love with Xin Xiong who loves Yue Gui. The triangle relationship is entangled with jealousy.

programme.title: Blessing of Formosa
programme.desc: The beauty of folklore is all around us in Taiwan, but we often overlook it and fail to appreciate and feel it. The aim of this program is to promote the beauty of Taiwanese folklore and bring folklore to life. This program showcases folk culture regardless of race or religion, and presents travel information in a fun way, combining easy-to-understand folk culture knowledge with the mission of passing on folk culture. The audience can learn more about folk cultural products such as handicrafts, antiques, temple folklore, as well as short stories about the gods, and information about local tourism. It is an educational and entertaining way to travel and learn about folklore.

programme.desc: Depending on the locations of the missions, Jacky Wu, the leader of the home team, invites various celebrities to take on challenges and bring you excitement every week.

programme.title: Rainy Night Flower
programme.desc: After leaving reformatory, Xin Xiong joins a gang to make a living and soon he becomes a leader of the gang. He takes protection fees from vendors and works hard to 'maintain the local order' in his way. He has thus developed a very good relationship with the law enforcement unit. Later, a teahouse owner Gui Zhu has fallen in love with Xin Xiong who loves Yue Gui. The triangle relationship is entangled with jealousy.

programme.title: Stylish Man-The Chef
programme.desc: Stylish Man The Chef is co-hosted by the Golden Bell Awards winner Sam Tseng and Genie Chuo, together with professional chef, James. There are two main themes for the program, which are Big Stars Come to Cook and Five-Star Cooking Show. Stylish Man The Chef containing not only the bomb of laughter, but the audience can also gain practical cooking knowledge throughout the program.

programme.title: Battle Tour - EastvsWest
programme.desc: It is more than just a food and travel show as it is a cultural journey. The program blends travel, cuisine, and culture, inviting viewers not only to taste but also to experience the stories, people, and places behind Taiwanese food and destinations. Through lively food challenges, scenic explorations, and authentic local encounters, the hosts bring audiences closer to Taiwans diverse flavors and vibrant traditions.

programme.title: Hot Door Night
programme.desc: Different in age, generation, and hosting style, these three hosts not only can sing, act, dance, and imitate, but are also skilled in cross-talk! With this unique combination, we hope to attract viewers of all ages and spark great entertainment.

programme.title: The Sound of Happiness
programme.desc: Wu is a senior police officer has always wanted a son to carry his family name and join the force. However, he and wife are bequeathed with four daughters! As a doting father, his chief objective is to help them find happiness in their marriages. In this charming drama, Wu & his wife become their daughters greatest haven, through the ups and downs they face as married women.

programme.title: The Tradition Story of Taiwan
programme.desc: The Tradition Story of Taiwan presents a series of tales and folktales in Taiwan that have been pass down from one generation to another generation.

programme.title: Stylish Man-The Chef
programme.desc: Stylish Man The Chef is co-hosted by the Golden Bell Awards winner Sam Tseng and Genie Chuo, together with professional chef, James. There are two main themes for the program, which are Big Stars Come to Cook and Five-Star Cooking Show. Stylish Man The Chef containing not only the bomb of laughter, but the audience can also gain practical cooking knowledge throughout the program.

programme.title: Langit Tidak Selalu Cerah
programme.desc: Huzaimah gilakan kemewahan dan darjat sehingga sanggup meninggalkan suami dan anaknya demi mengejar kesenangan dunia. Dia berjaya menjadi seorang penyanyi namun telah diperdaya oleh Jeff, lelaki yang dianggapnya sebagai kekasih ke kancah pelacuran. Sedar dan ingin memohon maaf ke suami dan anaknya, dia mula mencari mereka. Namun, kemaafan itu tidak tercapai kerana pintu hati yang sudah tertutup. Kemudian, satu insiden telah membuka semula pintu hati mereka untuk memaafkan Huzaimah yang sedang menghidap HIV.

programme.title: Maria Mariana 1
programme.desc: Dua beradik berbeza perwatakan - Maria, anak kebanggaan keluarga yang cemerlang dalam pelajaran - manakala Mariana, anak yang sering memberontak dan liar. Maria membesar menjadi seorang anggota polis namun Mariana masih sama seperti dahulu. Persengketaan terjadi apabila keduanya menyukai lelaki yang sama. Diculik geng, Maria sanggup menaruhkan nyawa demi menyelamatkan Mariana.

programme.title: Maria Mariana 2
programme.desc: Maria dikejarkan ke hospital dan menemui cinta bersama doktor yang menyelamatkannya. Kemudiannya, dia ditugaskan untuk membanteras sindiket pengedaran dadah. Hubungan Maria dan Mariana kembali tegang apabila bekas kekasih Mariana muncul kembali. Cara hidup liar Mariana menyebabkan dia diperalatkan dan menimbulkan kekacauan dalam hidup mereka.

programme.title: Ke Medan Jaya
programme.desc: Hisham tinggal bersama ibunya, Mak Jah. Bapanya yang bekerja sebagai anggota tentera telah meninggal dunia akibat serangan musuh semasa zaman darurat. Sejak kematian suaminya, Mak Jah bekerja sebagai pembantu rumah dengan seorang hartawan bernama Pak Samad. Pak Samad dan isterinya tidak pernah menganggap Mak Jah sebagai pembantu rumah, malah Hisham dianggap seperti anak mereka sendiri dan mendapat pendidikan yang sama dengan Haryati, anak hartawan tersebut. Apabila wujud kemesraan antara mereka berdua, ibu bapa Haryati merasa bimbang kerana Haryati telah ditunangkan dengan Shahril. Setelah mengetahui kisah sebenar, Hisham mengambil Keputusan untuk menyertai angkatan tentera walaupun ditentang oleh ibunya.

programme.title: SH3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang percintaan dan persaingan siapa yang terbaik antara pemain papan selaju ketika kemuncak musik Hip Hop dan sukan papan selaju di negara. Khairul, ingin menjadi pemain papan selaju yang terbaik tetapi menemui kesulitan kerana lawannya, Mario yang juga sama mahir. Ingin memenangi hati Nelly, Khairul ingin terus membuktikan kehandalannya. Pada masa yang sama, Mario dan Mawar berpakat bersama-sama untuk memastikan mereka mendapat Khairul dan Nelly untuk diri mereka sendiri. Sikap setiakawan dan keluarga menjadi penyokong kuat Khairul untuk berjaya.

programme.title: Warna-Warna Hati
programme.desc: Kisah seorang wanita yang terpaksa menguruskan sebuat syarikat besar tanpa bantuan keluarganya. Perniagaan syarikat milik keluarga Puan Rohani mengalami pelbagai masalah selepas Encik Osman, pengurus syarikat tersebut terlibat dalam kes penyelewengan wang syarikat. Anak-anak Puan Rohani yang tidak berminat untuk membantu ibunya dan mengambil tahu mengenai syarikat tersebut menyebabkan Puan Rohani memberi kepercayaan kepada Encik Osman. Puan Rohani juga cuba memujuk anak lelakinya, Hafsham yang baru tamat pengajian dari Amerika Syarikat untuk bekerja di syarikat itu dan membantunya untuk menguruskan syarikat

programme.title: Sepet
programme.desc: Sepasang kekasih melalui pelbagai halangan dalam percintaan kerana keduanya berasal dari latar belakang yang berbeza. Orked mencintai Jason yang berbangsa Cina dan bukan beragama Islam. Disebabkan itu pelbagai tekanan terpaksa mereka hadapi kerana stereotaip bangsa dan berlainan agama namun berjaya mereka hadapinya bersama-sama.

programme.title: Main Wayang
programme.desc: Program temu bual santai bersama peminat dan penggiat filem tempatan yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi tetamu berkaitan filem Labu Labi.

programme.title: One,Two,Trivia
programme.desc: Sebuahprogram yang merungkai fakta-fakta menarik yang tersimpan dalam filem-filem klasik tempatan

programme.title: Ruang Temu
programme.desc: Program temu bual bersama Yusof Wahab yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi beliau berkaitan pengalaman beliau di dalam industri seni

programme.title: Gemilang
programme.desc: Julia merupakan seorang penyanyi yang mencapai kejayaan di atas sokongan seorang hartawan bernama Razlan. Rita, teman baik Julia pula merupakan seorang artis terkenal dan menganggap Julia sebagai sumber inspirasinya. Julia merasakan keselamatan dirinya terancam apabila gerak-gerinya sering diawasi oleh seorang lelaki misteri.

programme.title: Cinta Metropolitan
programme.desc: Haris, seorang jurugambar bertemu semula dengan adiknya yang terkenal sebagai seorang casanova, Irwan. Tidak begitu senang dengan perangai adiknya yang suka menggoda sesiapa sahaja termasuk kekasihnya sendiri, hubungan mereka renggang. Satu sindiket pemalsuan wang terbongkar menyebabkan Haris, Irwan, Monisa dan dua orang lagi diburu sindiket itu sehingga ke luar negara.

programme.title: Main Wayang
programme.desc: Program temu bual santai bersama peminat dan penggiat filem tempatan yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi tetamu berkaitan filem Labu Labi.

programme.title: One,Two,Trivia
programme.desc: Sebuahprogram yang merungkai fakta-fakta menarik yang tersimpan dalam filem-filem klasik tempatan

programme.title: Ruang Temu
programme.desc: Program temu bual bersama Yusof Wahab yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi beliau berkaitan pengalaman beliau di dalam industri seni

programme.title: Sepi
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tiga orang yang berasingan mengenal erti cinta, kehilangan dan kesepian. Adam, seorang tukang masak terkenal yang meluaskan kerjayanya dengan mereka hiasan untuk majlis perkahwinan. Tetapi, dengan segala kejayaan itu beliau masih membujang dan belum bertemu jodohnya sendiri. Sufi pula seorang lelaki yang sedang cuba melenyapkan memori kematian isterinya. Akhir sekali, Iman, seorang penulis muda yang menjadikan pentas teater sebagai tapak untuk memahami masa silamnya dan kupasan demi kupasan ke dalam masa depannya sendiri. Ketiga-tiga watak ini akhirnya terkait dalam satu insiden dramatik yang akan merubah kehidupan mereka buat selamanya.

programme.title: Castello
programme.desc: Solo mula menjalankan kegiatan sebagai pengedar dadah untuk menjadikan kehidupan keluarganya lebih mewah. Tapi Solo tertangkap dan dia dipenjara selama 20 tahun. Di dalam penjara, dia dikenali sebagai Castello. Keluar dari penjara, Castello cuba mengesan semula isteri dan anaknya. Tapi dia kecewa bila mengetahui anak gadisnya Phim telah menjadi penagih dadah. Castello berusaha untuk menyelamatkan Phim yang tidak menyedari bahawa Castello adalah bapanya

programme.title: Haluan
programme.desc: Mengisahkan seorang pemandu bas Ghaffar yang dihukum penjara 10 tahun kerana bersalah atas kemalangan bas yang meragut nyawa 15 penumpang. Setelah dibebaskan Ghaffar menyesal dengan sepenuh hati dan ingin memohon maaf pada setiap penumpang yang terlibat. Dalam masa yang sama, Ghaffar berusaha untuk memperbaiki hubungan dengan keluarganya. Berita pembebasan Ghaffar juga mendapat perhatian wartawan yang inginkan penjelasan bagi kemalangan tersebut.

programme.title: Cleopatra In Sapce
programme.desc: Cleopatra, seorang puteri remaja di Mesir mengimpikan lebih banyak pengembaraan dalam hidupnya. Ketika bermain permainan dengan rakannya, dia terperangkap ke dalam portal yang membawanya ke masa 30, 000 tahun hadapan!

programme.title: Droners

Max sendiri tidak dapat membuktikan kisahnya itu dan semua orang menganggap dia menipu, termasuk ahli pasukannya sendiri.

programme.title: ChatSAT
programme.desc: It will do its utmost to gather the trendiest and latest information from around the world, covering everything from global events, medical encyclopedias, arts, and technology to daily life and trending online topics, sharing them with the audience every Saturday. By discussing everything under the sun and chatting about the hottest topics, “Group friend” listeners can easily stay up to date with global trends by following the program.

programme.title: News Magazine 2026
programme.desc: "News Perspective" is a weekly program featuring in-depth coverage of notable news stories from Hong Kong and around the world. It focuses on social issues that matter most to Hong Kong residents and invites people from various sectors, scholars, and experts to discuss and analyze the underlying causes and developments.

programme.title: Profession Impossible
programme.desc: To showcase the talents of local fashion designers, TVB specially produced a fashion design competition reality show. Ten contestants advanced from the preliminary rounds to the semi-finals, each designing two pieces for their collaborating artists based on environmental and Chinese themes, competing for five spots in the finals. The final five faced a final test, creating two outfits each based on a unisex and evening gown theme, which they then paired with their artists to showcase their style on the Catwalk stage, where the champion, first runner-up, and second runner-up were determined! Hosts Nancy Wu and Benjamin Yuen, along with "star" judges Walter Ma, William So, Gigi Leung, Kathy Chow, Amanda S., and others, witnessed the journey of "The Tailoring Magician".

programme.title: The Taste Of Us
programme.desc: Delicious food, bursting with color, aroma, and flavor, not only fills the stomach but also soothes the soul! Liangliang (Mason Fung), a freelancer who loves singing and food, is feeling lost after breaking up with his girlfriend Jessica (Carmen Ngai). To prove his financial independence, he rents out his vacant room. His tenant, Azhi (Zeno Koo ), is a cooking enthusiast who frequently unleashes his culinary skills, creating a variety of heartwarming dishes such as "Miso Clam Soup" and "Chicken and Avocado Mexican Rolls"... The two young men hit it off immediately, satisfying each other's hunger and filling each other's voids! What kind of interesting relationship will these two very different personalities build?

programme.title: Hong Kong: Never Too Small
programme.desc: The series focuses on micro-apartments and small-footprint living. It showcases how architects and interior designers use creative problem-solving to turn tiny, often cramped spaces (some as small as 24 square meters) into stylish, functional, and highly livable homes

programme.title: Music Money Monster
programme.desc: Pushing the limits of vocal range and precise timing, the brand-new interactive music game show Music Money Monster" is hosted by Sammy, Eric Kwok, and Lee Yin-tung. A professional pitch analysis system tests the contestants. A nine-square grid represents nine difficulty levels. Contestants who connect three lines to "pass the level" can choose to withdraw their winnings, continue the challenge, or even attempt the most difficult Monster level. Failure results in zero prize money! The amateur version allows solo participants to compete for a top prize of NT$100,000. The celebrity version offers viewers a chance to win prizes and gifts by interacting with the contestants in the live stream and sending emojis to cheer them on.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.

programme.title: J Music 2026
programme.desc: J Music is dedicated to creating a high-quality music platform, providing singers with opportunities to showcase their musical talents while allowing music fans to gain a deeper understanding of their musical stories. The program invites popular singers as guests, who personally select their favorite new and old works, perform them live, and share their favorite tracks. New faces in the music scene will also appear, showcasing their musical potential through interactive exchanges. Furthermore, each episode closely follows the latest developments on the Jade Solid Gold Chart, featuring music videos and interviews with various singers, songwriters, and producers, who discuss their work and the people and events within the music industry.

programme.title: News Magazine 2026
programme.desc: "News Perspective" is a weekly program featuring in-depth coverage of notable news stories from Hong Kong and around the world. It focuses on social issues that matter most to Hong Kong residents and invites people from various sectors, scholars, and experts to discuss and analyze the underlying causes and developments.

programme.title: ChatSAT
programme.desc: It will do its utmost to gather the trendiest and latest information from around the world, covering everything from global events, medical encyclopedias, arts, and technology to daily life and trending online topics, sharing them with the audience every Saturday. By discussing everything under the sun and chatting about the hottest topics, “Group friend” listeners can easily stay up to date with global trends by following the program.

programme.title: Not Far From Here
programme.desc: Even with limited vacation time, you can still embark on a trip to explore the Greater Bay Area, thanks to "Not Far From Here"!C Kwan,Billy Luk and Karen Wu team up to uncover travel information, savoring modern Cantonese cuisine, top-notch vegetarian dishes, exquisite French food, and the delightful Omakase dessert. A sensory feast of exotic insects awaits. Immerse yourself in a jazz whiskey bar, enjoying vinyl music and stand-up comedy performances. Leisure and entertainment abound, including luxurious massage treatments, a five-star buffet, and a variety of recreational facilities. What's it like to experience a storm-themed spa? Dress up and enjoy an escape room adventure - thrilling enough! The team will also visit trendy areas and Western antique museums to find their favorite items.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong
programme.desc: Report important news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs.

programme.title: Who Wants A Baby?
programme.desc: An unexpected pregnancy catches couple TONG TIM-YEE (Ali Lee) and IP CHI-TING (Lai Lok Yi) off guard. They depend on their mothers for baby-sitting, but conflict ensues when the in-laws' parenting skills are poles apart. The emotionally wrought and physically challenging experience of caring for their baby girl 24/7 leaves them no other choice but to hire an experienced confinement nanny, WONG KAI-MIU (Griselda Yeung), to help them. The arrival of her newborn forces TIM-YEE to give up her fashion career; whereas CHI-TING has to say goodbye to his relaxing and enjoyable nightlife. In order to spend more time to look after her daughter, TIM-YEE changes her career to take over a post-natal care agency. With KAI-MIU pulling a few strings, TIM-YEE gets to know many expectant couples and nannies. In her role as a new mom, she is struck with a newfound appreciation, but feels like she and her husband CHI-TING are growing apart. On top of that, she even suspects that he has an affair with his coworker bartender HUI CHING (Samantha Ko). Surprisingly, CHI-TING captivates the internet after bravely saving a child in an accident, and is dubbed the “greatest dad” ever, which makes the agency a childcare KOL, turning things upside down……

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Hong Kong life is vibrant and diverse, and "Hong Kong Life, Hong Kong Enjoyment" presents both sophisticated and elegant lifestyles and down-to-earth, high-quality experiences. The program combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: The brand-new children's program “Hands Up” encourages kids to ask questions bravely, express themselves, and pursue their goals! Members of the mascot “Sauce Family” join the hosts in performing short skits, accompanying everyone for joyful moments. The show will also feature a variety of children's songs, allowing kids to sing along while learning practical life knowledge.

programme.title: Legal Mavericks 2020
programme.desc: Blind barrister Man Sun-hop (Vincent Wong), aka Perception Man, has a superlative fourth sense. He teams up with female legal executive Chiu Ching-mui (Sisley Choi) and private investigator Kut Yat-ha (Owen Cheung) to seek justice for the underprivileged. They never hesitate to use tactics that involve “pushing the boundaries”. Barrister Shaw Mei-la (Kelly Cheung) earnestly approaches Sun-hop. They are then to fight it out in court. Also, Mei-la's pupil master Kan Siu-wang (Paul Chun) constantly back Mei-la up. While Sun-hop was serving his pupillage with his pupil master Siu-wang, a homicide case involving some missing corpse had caused Shifu and his disciple to become foes. Sun-hop presents new evidence and lodges an appeal for the defendant. He and Siu-wang again confront each other, causing successive rounds of conflict. Meanwhile, the emergence of Mei-la brings about subtle changes in the formidable Sun-hop, Ching-mui and Yat-ha's triangular relationship.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.

programme.title: News Treasury 2026
programme.desc: As the saying goes, "Today's news is tomorrow's history." With so much news every day, it's hard for everyone to take it all in, let alone look back at history. History is a treasure trove—if we ignore or underestimate it, we might miss out on its riches. The new program "News Treasure Hunt" guides viewers to uncover news gems from this vault. In addition to special features, live broadcasts, and series reports from the past, the show offers never-before-seen precious footage. Audiences will have the chance to revisit events such as Bruce Lee's funeral, the Bank of Po Sang robbery, the Gang of Four trial, the Queen's visit to Hong Kong, taxi strikes, the signing of the Sino-British Joint Declaration, an exclusive interview with Margaret Thatcher, Vietnamese refugees, the death of Governor Youde, Chris Patten's arrival in Hong Kong, the closure of Kai Tak Airport, the passing of Deng Xiaoping, the 1997 Handover Ceremony, the China Airlines Hong Kong crash, and SARS press conferences.

programme.title: Cantopop At 50
programme.desc: Throughout the years, countless hit songs have emerged in both Chinese and international music scenes. Regardless of the era, every work has its own devoted fans. " Cantopop At 50" invites original singers or accomplished vocalists to reinterpret these once-popular classics that transcend generations, delivering high-quality musical enjoyment to music lovers. In addition to featuring influential senior artists in the music industry, the program also welcomes many singers who have not appeared in public for a long time, bringing multiple surprises to the audience.

programme.title: News Magazine 2026
programme.desc: "News Perspective" is a weekly program featuring in-depth coverage of notable news stories from Hong Kong and around the world. It focuses on social issues that matter most to Hong Kong residents and invites people from various sectors, scholars, and experts to discuss and analyze the underlying causes and developments.

programme.title: J Music 2026
programme.desc: J Music is dedicated to creating a high-quality music platform, providing singers with opportunities to showcase their musical talents while allowing music fans to gain a deeper understanding of their musical stories. The program invites popular singers as guests, who personally select their favorite new and old works, perform them live, and share their favorite tracks. New faces in the music scene will also appear, showcasing their musical potential through interactive exchanges. Furthermore, each episode closely follows the latest developments on the Jade Solid Gold Chart, featuring music videos and interviews with various singers, songwriters, and producers, who discuss their work and the people and events within the music industry.

programme.title: Music Money Monster
programme.desc: Pushing the limits of vocal range and precise timing, the brand-new interactive music game show Music Money Monster" is hosted by Sammy, Eric Kwok, and Lee Yin-tung. A professional pitch analysis system tests the contestants. A nine-square grid represents nine difficulty levels. Contestants who connect three lines to "pass the level" can choose to withdraw their winnings, continue the challenge, or even attempt the most difficult Monster level. Failure results in zero prize money! The amateur version allows solo participants to compete for a top prize of NT$100,000. The celebrity version offers viewers a chance to win prizes and gifts by interacting with the contestants in the live stream and sending emojis to cheer them on.

programme.title: Christian's Choice
programme.desc: Hong Kong's culinary industry has been buffeted by the pandemic, economic downturn, and a surge in consumer spending in mainland China, putting its precious culinary culture at risk. Some restaurants remain steadfast, honing their craft day after day, adapting to changing circumstances. They're sharing these challenging times with their customers through exceptional culinary skills and delicious cuisine, a journey that brings growth to the community. Adhering to the principles of authentic, independently owned restaurants with a long history, host Christian Yang curates a selection of "Friends" restaurants, exploring the hidden, heartwarming stories behind these establishments, tasting their extraordinary signature dishes, and appreciating the fighting spirit of Hong Kong's culinary culture.

programme.title: Finance Magazine 2026
programme.desc: "Financial Insights" keeps a close watch on the market, reviewing weekly trends in Hong Kong stocks and paying attention to the real estate sector. Through exclusive interviews with industry professionals and market analysis, the program explores popular local and international finance topics in a clear and accessible manner. It also features in-depth reports on the challenges faced by different industries as they develop.

programme.title: Gourmet Express
programme.desc: Hong Kong brings together global cuisines, and its unique dishes and down-to-earth fare have captured the close attention of discerning food lovers! Food hosts and presenters such as Icy Wong,Snowy Choi,Carmen Ngai,Carmaney Wong , Jessica Liu , Gillian Ng keep up with the latest food news and deals, delving into the stories behind the flavors. Gathering firsthand information on popular eateries across various platforms, the hosts personally line up and taste the food, providing genuine reviews. Even takeout-only eateries with no dine-in option are in high demand—what are the must-try picks? Running a food business inevitably comes with its own mix of sweet, sour, bitter, and spicy experiences. The production team follows the proprietors through their busy day, from sourcing ingredients and preparing materials to opening for business, uncovering the "stories behind the flavors."

programme.title: News At 18:30
programme.desc: Jade Channel reports important local, cross-strait, and international news every afternoon at 6:30.

programme.title: Sunday Report 2026 & Trick Or Cheat
programme.desc: " Sunday Report" focuses each week on popular newsmakers with feature reports, or takes a human-centered approach by visiting people from various social strata and industries to explore in depth political, social, and livelihood issues that concern the public.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.

programme.title: Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4
programme.desc: " Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4" has officially launched, continuing the success of the previous three seasons and once again providing a stage for singing enthusiasts to pursue their dreams. This season expands its recruitment efforts to North America and Australia, with several TVB artists participating "masked," igniting the flame of music globally and illuminating the hearts of countless dreamers. Stephanie Che continues to host, offering her warm smile to the contestants; Maria Cordero, Chow Kwok-fung, Cheung Ka-tim, Hai-er, and Gu Ya-wei also serve as judges, providing professional feedback and encouragement to the participants. On this new season's stage, everyone will weave an even more moving chapter with music, continuing the heartfelt story of " Midlife, Sing & Shine! 4."

programme.title: Star Weekly
programme.desc: The talk show "Star Weekly" invites celebrities and industry leaders each episode, along with entertainment anchors such as Au Wing-Kuen, Hsu Wen-Hsuan, and Wang Chen-Chuan, to share their recent work plans and discuss special topics related to movies, television, and concerts, especially people and events that netizens and friends in the industry are concerned about and discussing! With so much surrounding information, the show features a special "Fact Check" segment, where guests personally respond to various rumors, allowing the parties involved to clarify the truth!

programme.title: Gourmet Express Weekly
programme.desc: Hong Kong is a melting pot of global cuisine! Food anchors and hosts like Carmaney Wong,Carmen Ngai,Gillian Ng stay up-to-date with the latest culinary trends, gathering information on top-rated restaurants from various platforms. The hosts personally sample the food and provide honest reviews; they uncover hidden gems in different districts and invite long-time expatriates to visit their favorite hometown eateries; renowned chefs and food critics also guide the way, offering expert recommendations. The program features a selection of popular restaurants featured in "Food News Report," highlighting their signature dishes and delivering quick deals, ensuring viewers stay up-to-date with the most delicious and affordable dining information.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, as well as sports updates, keeping you informed about important events and trends in the world of sports.

programme.title: Vital Lifeline
programme.desc: Urban dwellers often experience a hectic pace of life and high levels of stress, making them more susceptible to health problems. "The Strongest Lifeline" helps you unravel the secrets to good health. To start, the program features a four-episode series on common urban pain issues, covering headaches, shoulder and neck pain, back pain, and joint pain. Each episode invites medical experts to explain the causes of these conditions, as well as physical therapists and exercise specialists to teach appropriate exercises. With the growing trend of integrating Eastern and Western medicine, even American swimming champion Michael Phelps uses cupping therapy to relieve pain. Therefore, each episode also includes traditional Chinese medical diagnosis, complemented by treatments such as acupuncture, cupping, and the “Sanfu” herbal patch therapy, which is especially suitable during the hottest days of summer. In addition, Chinese medicine practitioners share recipes for nourishing soups, all of which can help regulate and improve your health.

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong and Global View
programme.desc: Report important news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs.

programme.title: Kwoks And What, The
programme.desc: Seasoned Chinese frog closure instructor Kwok-Law Mei-lan (Paw Hee Ching) has raised her children and grandchildren by herself. She discovers everybody's issues before her 70th birthday. Her eldest son Kwok Tak-kan's (Joe Ma) business has failed, and he is also divorcing his wife Tian Yu-fei (Natalie Tong). Her second daughter Kwok Tak-bo (Che Yuen Yuen) and her son Kwok King-hin (Fei Wu) are drifting apart, and her relationship with her boyfriend has also ended. Her youngest son Kwok Tak-ming (Mat Yeung) loses his job as Tak-kan has got him into trouble. While Mei-lan wants to help her children solve their problems, she also plans to team up with her favorite disciple Chong Zi-chang (Grace Wong) to pass down the craft. Meanwhile, Tak-kan and his siblings keep contradicting each other. And gangster Kwok Chung-shek (Eddie Kwan) abruptly shows up and claims he has 50% ownership of the Kwoks' property. Can Mei-lan's strict adherence to the Kwoks motto “Keep walking and there's a way out” unite family members in the confrontation against the enemy?

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: HUNG SHU-KAN (Lau Dan) built his own logistics business from scratch and now everything is in order. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, HUNG YUEK-SHUI (Koni Lui), is still single. She and her little prodigy sister, HUNG SUM-YUE (Andrea So), often fight over small things, putting their father in dilemmas.

programme.title: Hands Up 2026
programme.desc: The brand-new children's program “Hands Up” encourages kids to ask questions bravely, express themselves, and pursue their goals! Members of the mascot “Sauce Family” join the hosts in performing short skits, accompanying everyone for joyful moments. The show will also feature a variety of children's songs, allowing kids to sing along while learning practical life knowledge.

programme.title: 2026 Feng Shui and Fortune & What's On Today
programme.desc: This is a seasonal variety and infotainment series typically produced for the Lunar New Year period. It features a panel of renowned Hong Kong geomancy experts to help viewers navigate the energy of the Year of the Fire Horse

programme.title: News Treasury 2026
programme.desc: As the saying goes, "Today's news is tomorrow's history." With so much news every day, it's hard for everyone to take it all in, let alone look back at history. programme.title: Pretty Dangerous
programme.desc: Some dope called Powder Gremlin is everywhere in the city. Undercover cop Poon Yik-fung (Mark Ma) has been mingling with wise guys and eventually brings narcotic chemist Kuen Sai-ho to justice, but the crook only receives a lenient sentence! Yik-fung asks his boss to consider extending the undercover operation with permission to recruit a contingent of undercover policewomen, and the aim is to investigate the mysterious mastermind behind Sai-ho's scheme. Yik-fung selects three pretty female decoys, each with their unique talents: Shum Kai-kei (Kelly Cheung), aka Female Sherlock Holmes; Kong Miu-chi (Jeannie Chan), aka Meticulous and Sharp-witted Martial Arts Expert; and Tung Siu-yue (Yuki Law), aka Ever-changing Walking Encyclopedia. They have to get close to philanthropic businessman Lau Biu (Eddie Kwan) and his wife Bonnie Ka (Maggie Shiu), and the only obstacle is their daughter Lau Po-yee (Yumi Chung). However, Yik-fung has some hidden agenda as he pushes the female decoys to carry out risky tasks.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: "Scoop" airs from Monday to Sunday, closely following major social events and interesting stories, while also reporting the latest updates in the entertainment industry, celebrity news, as well as drama promotions and behind-the-scenes features. The "Today's Breaking News" segment keeps viewers up to date with the day's hottest stories. The in-depth feature section explores current affairs, social, and livelihood issues that the public cares about, interviewing relevant experts for their insights.

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: " Big Boys Club" is a youth talk show hosted by a group of close friends—Bob Lam, Oscar Leung, Derek Wong, Philip Fan, and Alan Chan. In each episode, singers, entertainers, or guests from various fields are invited for relaxed interviews, presenting a wide range of topics including current social issues, pop culture, and trending interests. Matters of love, relationships, and even same-sex relationships are endlessly discussed topics for men and women alike. The show invites guests from diverse backgrounds to explore love and relationships, delving into the dynamics between the sexes. The "Other Dimension" segment features guests sharing extraordinary experiences, such as encounters with ghosts, UFOs, and bizarre happenings, bringing thrilling topics to the audience.

programme.title: Hands Up 2026

The show will also feature a variety of children's songs, allowing kids to sing along while learning practical life knowledge.

programme.title: Big City Shop 2026
programme.desc: “Big City Shop” introduces viewers to a wide range of timely topics, including seasonal products, health and wellness, fitness activities, skincare and makeup, fashion apparel, infant care, parenting knowledge, local delicacies, and pet care trends. The content is all-encompassing! In addition to hands-on demonstrations, experiences, or tests by the hosts, experts are invited to share their professional insights. In the cooking segment, several skilled culinary experts take turns showcasing simple and delicious healthy dishes and home-style recipes, helping everyone solve their cooking challenges.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: HUNG SHU-KAN (Lau Dan) built his own logistics business from scratch and now everything is in order. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! & What's On Today
programme.desc: While filming a historical food video, Shen Yaoguang's family accidentally enters a dream world and lands in ancient Yong'an. To survive, they open a small eatery serving modern style dishes, becoming unexpectedly popular. Mistaking Prefect Lin Yan for an ancestor, they move into his residence under a fake engagement and form a deep bond. Using modern knowledge, the family adapts to ancient life and helps Lin Yan uncover the truth behind his family's injustice, exposing Prince Wu's conspiracy. Together they protect the city, and after a life or death trial, they awaken back in reality with renewed understanding of family and heritage.

programme.title: 2026 Feng Shui and Fortune
programme.desc: This is a seasonal variety and infotainment series typically produced for the Lunar New Year period. It features a panel of renowned Hong Kong geomancy experts to help viewers navigate the energy of the Year of the Fire Horse

programme.title: Food Mister
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what fictional dishes in literature would taste like? The flavors of the food described by authors are left to the reader's interpretation; however, it's not entirely impossible to cook them in reality. The host invites celebrity chefs to find creative inspiration from TV series, video games, cartoons, and literary classics, discovering some of the featured dishes mentioned within them, and then, through the skillful hands of these master chefs, "recreating" these seemingly unreal dishes. Can these fantastical dishes actually be cooked? Or are they merely the creators' fantasies? The program immerses viewers in a culinary world where fantasy and reality intertwine!

programme.title: Gourmet Express Weekly
programme.desc: Hong Kong is a melting pot of global cuisine! Food anchors and hosts like Carmaney Wong,Carmen Ngai,Gillian Ng stay up-to-date with the latest culinary trends, gathering information on top-rated restaurants from various platforms. programme.title: Shining Just for You
programme.desc: The fantasy period drama "Shining Just for You" tells the story of Ye Ling Shuang (played by Peng Xiaoran), a grassland girl who is considered a jinx by her tribe because she can foresee disasters. Only Princess Qi Hai Rui (played by Liu Mengrui) of Ye Bei treats her like a sister. Ye Bei, overestimating its strength, launches a war against the Chao Kingdom, suffering a crushing defeat and losing many soldiers. Ye Ling Shuang is taken prisoner and sent to a brothel, but she refuses to submit. Using her talent for astrology, she enters the Imperial Observatory and gradually wins the heart of the ruthless emperor Yu Xiu Ming (played by Feng Shaofeng). However, just as their friendship deepens, Ye Ling Shuang learns of Qi Hai Rui's death and breaks ties with Yu Xiu Ming. Determined to save Qi Hai Rui, Ye Ling Shuang reverses time and returns to the Ye Bei of the past. Can she change what has already happened? And what will become of her relationship with Yu Xiu Ming?

programme.desc: Some dope called Powder Gremlin is everywhere in the city. Undercover cop Poon Yik-fung (Mark Ma) has been mingling with wise guys and eventually brings narcotic chemist Kuen Sai-ho to justice, but the crook only receives a lenient sentence! Yik-fung asks his boss to consider extending the undercover operation with permission to recruit a contingent of undercover policewomen, and the aim is to investigate the mysterious mastermind behind Sai-ho's scheme. Yik-fung selects three pretty female decoys, each with their unique talents: Shum Kai-kei (Kelly Cheung), aka Female Sherlock Holmes; Kong Miu-chi (Jeannie Chan), aka Meticulous and Sharp-witted Martial Arts Expert; and Tung Siu-yue (Yuki Law), aka Ever-changing Walking Encyclopedia. They have to get close to philanthropic businessman Lau Biu (Eddie Kwan) and his wife Bonnie Ka (Maggie Shiu), and the only obstacle is their daughter Lau Po-yee (Yumi Chung). However, Yik-fung has some hidden agenda as he pushes the female decoys to carry out risky tasks.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy!
programme.desc: While filming a historical food video, Shen Yaoguang's family accidentally enters a dream world and lands in ancient Yong'an. To survive, they open a small eatery serving modern style dishes, becoming unexpectedly popular. Mistaking Prefect Lin Yan for an ancestor, they move into his residence under a fake engagement and form a deep bond. Using modern knowledge, the family adapts to ancient life and helps Lin Yan uncover the truth behind his family's injustice, exposing Prince Wu's conspiracy. Together they protect the city, and after a life or death trial, they awaken back in reality with renewed understanding of family and heritage.

programme.title: Game of Scholars 2
programme.desc: is a popular educational variety and game show

programme.title: EXTRA
programme.desc: Report important news about Hong Kong, cross-strait, and international affairs. Stay updated every night with the latest news from Hong Kong's entertainment industry, as well as film and entertainment news from around the world. We report on the newest developments of artists, promotions for TV series and movies, highlights from concerts, and coverage of grand award ceremonies. We even travel abroad to cover major entertainment events, track international movie stars, and conduct exclusive interviews with well-known singers, actors, and television personalities familiar to our audience—ensuring you can instantly grasp the latest happenings and news in the world of film and entertainment.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, as well as sports updates, keeping you informed about important events and trends in the world of sports.

programme.title: Global View
programme.desc: " Global View," curated by seasoned journalists, guides you to view the world with a global perspective—broadening your horizons, expanding your understanding of the news, and enriching your knowledge.

programme.title: Legend Of Master Chai, The
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers. Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen. Their relationship worsened as they both fell in love with Nui (Leung Siu Bing)…

programme.title: Silver Chamber Of Sorrows, The
programme.desc: “Sheung's Silver Chamber”, the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM's family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG's younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM's family. Fueled by hatred, CHING SAU-HANG (Ng Wing Mei), WAN's lover, marries HANG and ironically becomes WAN's sister-in-law. WAN falls out with HANG, and opts to live abroad and disconnects from his family. After leaving home for years, WAN does not return home until the occasion to celebrate his father's birthday. Tension between the two brothers comes to a head when HANG is reluctant to pay ransom to save the youngest son of WAN. WAN is determined to disconnect completely from his family ever since. Since WAN's return, SAU-HANG suffers from her husband's neglect and gets framed for causing the fourth concubine FEI FEI's (Wu Ting Yan) miscarriage. Hatred leads her to commit act that revenge. She seeks to subvert SHEUNG's family by luring KWAN. Intentionally, she unveils TSAU KUK (Yeung Sze Ki), the maid in the family, is HANG's illegitimate daughter. The dark age of a once-prominent family begins…

programme.title: Hello Missfortune
programme.desc: In a multidimensional domain, Poon Siu-yu (Erica Chan) enters the second dimension after her death in the first dimension, i.e. the mortal realm. She then joins Office of the Life Authority and becomes a novice “destiny administrator”. Siu-yu has to keep a close watch on food courier Chan Pei-ho (Hubert Wu), who is in the mortal realm. Pei-ho earns a meager living regardless of the weather. But his family members just do not care about him. He is already overwhelmed by life pressures, and he is also jinxed by “bad spirit” Siu-yu while doing his job. Siu-yu gradually sympathizes with Pei-ho. Meanwhile, Pei-ho also realizes this mysterious girl has covertly helped him a lot. The duo then even recklessly start a romantic relationship that is probably going to have no future.

programme.title: Pages Of Treasures
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that “knowledge is power”. He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING's further studies on computer sciences in America. The two brothers return to Hong Kong eventually and they work in the same commercial building. CHING works as a senior network security engineer while MING works as a junior security guard. MAN worries that the difference in their job ranking will hinder their relationship. MING admires a girl YUEN WAI CHUNG (Kwok Sonija) who opens a paper mud figure shop. MAN tries to help MING establish his career by buying a secondhand bookshop for him to operate. However, MAN doesn't realize that the virtual world is gradually manipulating his family. CHING meets a romanticist TSU HEI MAN (Yeo Vivien) at work which creates misunderstanding between him and his girlfriend, LUI YUEN YI (Yeung Shirley). MAN's younger daughter FONG SUM MEI (Ho Lily) indulges herself in the virtual world and she is suspected for stealing exam papers on the internet…

programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that “knowledge is power”. He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING's further studies on computer sciences in America. The two brothers return to Hong Kong eventually and they work in the same commercial building. CHING works as a senior network security engineer while MING works as a junior security guard. MAN worries that the difference in their job ranking will hinder their relationship. MING admires a girl YUEN WAI CHUNG (Kwok Sonija) who opens a paper mud figure shop. MAN tries to help MING establish his career by buying a secondhand bookshop for him to operate. However, MAN doesn't realize that the virtual world is gradually manipulating his family. CHING meets a romanticist TSU HEI MAN (Yeo Vivien) at work which creates misunderstanding between him and his girlfriend, LUI YUEN YI (Yeung Shirley). MAN's younger daughter FONG SUM MEI (Ho Lily) indulges herself in the virtual world and she is suspected for stealing exam papers on the internet…

programme.title: Pages Of Treasures
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that “knowledge is power”. programme.title: Legend Of Master Chai, The
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers. Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen. Their relationship worsened as they both fell in love with Nui (Leung Siu Bing)…

programme.title: Legend Of Master Chai, The
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers. Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen. Their relationship worsened as they both fell in love with Nui (Leung Siu Bing)…

programme.title: Silver Chamber Of Sorrows, The
programme.desc: “Sheung's Silver Chamber”, the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM's family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG's younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM's family. Fueled by hatred, CHING SAU-HANG (Ng Wing Mei), WAN's lover, marries HANG and ironically becomes WAN's sister-in-law. WAN falls out with HANG, and opts to live abroad and disconnects from his family. After leaving home for years, WAN does not return home until the occasion to celebrate his father's birthday. Tension between the two brothers comes to a head when HANG is reluctant to pay ransom to save the youngest son of WAN. WAN is determined to disconnect completely from his family ever since. Since WAN's return, SAU-HANG suffers from her husband's neglect and gets framed for causing the fourth concubine FEI FEI's (Wu Ting Yan) miscarriage. Hatred leads her to commit act that revenge. She seeks to subvert SHEUNG's family by luring KWAN. Intentionally, she unveils TSAU KUK (Yeung Sze Ki), the maid in the family, is HANG's illegitimate daughter. The dark age of a once-prominent family begins…

programme.title: Hello Missfortune
programme.desc: In a multidimensional domain, Poon Siu-yu (Erica Chan) enters the second dimension after her death in the first dimension, i.e. the mortal realm. She then joins Office of the Life Authority and becomes a novice “destiny administrator”. Siu-yu has to keep a close watch on food courier Chan Pei-ho (Hubert Wu), who is in the mortal realm. Pei-ho earns a meager living regardless of the weather. But his family members just do not care about him. He is already overwhelmed by life pressures, and he is also jinxed by “bad spirit” Siu-yu while doing his job. Siu-yu gradually sympathizes with Pei-ho. Meanwhile, Pei-ho also realizes this mysterious girl has covertly helped him a lot. The duo then even recklessly start a romantic relationship that is probably going to have no future.

programme.title: Legend Of Master Chai, The
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. programme.title: Happy Ever After
programme.desc: TUNG KOON (AU YEUNG CHUN WAH, BOBBY) born with a special 'King's Tongue' is betrayed by his assistant, SIU SIU (CHAN MIU YING, MARIANE) who had prepared some chili source without permission. TUNG is accused of deceiving the Emperor and is forced to flee from Guangzhou to the capital. When SIU discovered that someone had used her to trap TUNG, she sees TUNG in person and apologizes. TUNG and SIU eventually reconcile. Love feeling blossoms between them. They join together to cook a very delicious 'Marinated Lung Slice'. The Emperor, KIN LUNG (KWONG WA) loves it very much and offer TUNG to work in the palace kitchen. Since then TUNG becomes one of the Emperor's favourite officials. TUNG's good friend, MIN LEUNG (KWOK CHUN ON) gains an official title with his wife, TSUI FA (LEUNG NGAI LING, FIONA)'s support. However, LEUNG abandons FA because of the reunion with his old lover, SIN YUNG (CHEONG WAI YEE, ANGIE). In order not to ruin LEUNG's reputation, FA tolerates. Unexpectedly, YUNG accepts bribes secretly on behalf of LEUNG. YUNG's act ruins LEUNG's future….

programme.title: Brick Slaves
programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work. In order to continue to pay the mortgage, YIU-MING has no other choice but to accept the unreasonable condition imposed by KIN-CHING, however the two often have arguments due to their differences in lifestyles. Later on, YIU-MING unveils that there is quite a story behind KIN-CHING's personality that makes everyone keep a distance from her. Eventually, YIU-MING finds a new job with a property management company. Unknown to him, his arrival ruins LO PIT-TAT's (Mak Cheung Ching) hope of getting promoted, so PIT-TAT, a third-generation brick slave, for the sake of keeping his own job becomes completely incompatible with YIU-MING at work. Nevertheless, YIU-MING gains recognition from his boss, LI OI-WAH (Sheung Tin Ngor), who even urges him to specifically look after a trainee called CHUK PIK-KEI (Eliza Sam). Due to their work, YIU-MING and PIK-KEI get to observe the world around the brick slaves. PIK-KEI gradually falls in love with YIU-MING, yet YIU-MING knows very well whom he really loves. All of a sudden, KIN-CHING requests to end the tenancy......

programme.title: The Runner
programme.desc: Web media editor Ho Ka-yan (Elaine Yiu) encounters track and field coach Yuen Nik (Joel Chan) as she is assigned the task of approaching the Windchasers Club and digging up scandalous dirt. Because of some past regrettable incident, Yuen Nik avoids socializing with other people. But he is getting closer and closer to Ka-yan as he repeatedly mingles with her. Kwok Bui-yee (Tiffany Lau), daughter of tycoon Kwok Wong-po (Ram Chiang), eagerly joins Windchasers as she has some ulterior motive. However, Wong-po and Yuen Nik keep agitating each other as Wong-po becomes Windchasers' sponsor. Yuen Nik's buddy Lai Shun-fan (Max Cheung) asks Yuen Nik to look after his young son Mak Yu-sun. The duo gradually develop an amicable mentor-disciple relationship. And Shun-fan and Ka-yan actually had some emotional issues. Shun-fan then becomes self-destructive due to some serious illness. Yuen Nik is determined to make him pick himself up. Meanwhile, Yuen Nik takes a good look at himself as he wants to again set foot on the runway.

programme.title: Rosy Business
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI's (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife. KIU's first and second wives, YAN FUNG YEE (Tse Suet Sum) and PANG KIU (Sheung Tin Ngor, Kiki), always make things difficult for KEI. KEI, who is an extremely clever person who never wastes time on trivial things, turns every threat into an opportunity. This makes KIU appreciate her wisdom and persistence. He entrusts his business to her and tells her to find a suitable successor for him before he dies. Despite all the attacks in the family, KEI manages to keep the business in good shape. She has never forgotten KIU's last wish, too. By chance, she discovers that TSEUNG PIT CHING (Ng Cheuk Hai, Ron), KIU's second son, is not really a playboy but an upright person loved by everyone in the shop. She therefore guides and helps him in every possible way, but her efforts are met with CHAI KAU's (Lai Yiu Cheung) challenges. KAU seeks vengeance for being mistreated and wants a pay back from TSEUNG family. After rounds after rounds of battle wits and actual fights, KEI and KAU begin to appreciate each other. KAU even falls for KEI as time goes by…

programme.title: Law dis-Order
programme.desc: As the founder of the leading Chinese law firm, CHEUK KAI-YIU (Lau Dan) has been re-elected as chairman of the committee for many terms. Though he promised managing partner LAU KING-CHANG (Liu Kai Chi) that he would step down, he deliberately brings in a materialistic lawyer called CHEUNG KEUNG (Alex Fong) to counterbalance KING-CHANG's obsession with power. For years, KING-CHANG has built up significant influence in the company and his associates include YAM WAI-LEUNG (Raymond Cho) and FONG NING (Mandy Wong). Thinking he could easily handle his opponent CHEUNG KEUNG's allies namely LEE SIU-WAH (Florence Kwok) and CHOW LIK-HANG (Matthew Ho), a traffic accident catches him off guard. Taking advantage of the situation, CHEUNG KEUNG gets himself a lucrative offer from KAI-YIU to become a senior partner, and even re-encounters lawyer CHEUK YI-CHUN (Ali Lee) in the process. YI-CHUN, who has a special position in the company, initially looks down on CHEUNG KEUNG but later grows fond of him. The two form a peer mentoring relationship, forcing KING-CHANG, the power-obsessed "time bomb", to finally fess up. With the descent into infighting of the whole firm, a toothless tiger that has managed to stay under the radar for years is seeking revenge......

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: A mermaid from the Joseon period ends up in present-day Seoul, where she crosses paths with a swindler who may have ties to someone from her past.

programme.title: Cha's Family
programme.desc: From Thailand to Japan, the cast explore bold local flavors, craft their own signature spicy sauce, and bring Korea's passion for heat to a global stage—mixing food, culture, and adventure into one sizzling journey.

programme.desc: 2PM's Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.title: Walking Through The Village
programme.desc: Actor Gu Bon-seung shows the warmth and purity of life in the village along the river, and presents how new history was made and became one's memory.

programme.title: Wok The World

programme.title: The Village Barber

programme.title: Dear X
programme.desc: Dear X follows Baek Ah-jin, a top actress who leverages her beauty and popularity to further her career through manipulation. She harbors a lot of grudges behind her somewhat good-natured demeanor.
